reviews.review_text:
I had gone in for some calf pain I was experiencing after doing physical activity.

As soon as I arrived, I was immediately helped and set up in a room waiting to be seen.

Shortly after Steph, the Nurse assisting me, took my vitals quickly and effortlessly and began asking me questions about what had happened. She was phenomenal! Super sweet and friendly.

Once she had finished with everything, I was told to wait for the Nurse Practitioner. Shortly after, Jessica, the nurse practitioner that saw me, came in and started to assess my calf and asking me questions as well. She was very gentle, precise and knew exactly where to feel for the pain. Based on what I was experiencing and felt, she recommended I take an X-Ray just to be safe so I did. It came back negative and she said it was most likely a mild sprain of the muscle. She even went so far as to offer me crutches but I assured her the pain wasn’t that bad thankfully! Ever since then I’ve been resting and icing it as she recommended and it’s gotten a lot better!

All in all, the whole staff there was phenomenal. Everyone was very nice, genuine and sweet. I felt very comfortable and confident that I was being taken care off and had nothing to worry about.

I would definitely recommend this location to anyone who made need an appointment and would definitely come back again if needed!
reviews.owner_answer: Hello William - Thank you for the five-star review of your urgent care visit. We truly appreciate your kind feedback about our staff. Many thanks for choosing Baptist Health for your healthcare needs.

reviews.review_text: As someone who absolutely hates and is terrified of everything medical, I am shocked to say that this place is actually great. I came here with severe interceptive health anxiety because I was feeling dizzy. It takes a lot for me to walk into a medical office by myself. Usually, I have full-blown panic attack attacks. Here I did not. I walked in and actually felt safe. I was checked in with an iPad very quickly. The receptionist could have been a bit more friendly and loving to make me feel more at ease. I was done called in also very quickly. The original nurse was very kind. The nurse practitioner that then saw me was very nice and recommended to do a CAT scan. She told me they saw fluid in my ears and inflammation in my sinuses which most likely meant that I had a sinus infection. I wasn’t happy that they were not absolutely certain but it is what it is I guess. I suppose medicine is not certain. They prescribed me antibiotics, Zyrtec, and Flonase. Which again is not ideal because they couldn’t prove that I have allergies. As someone with anxiety, I refuse to accept uncertainty. The antibiotics gave me diarrhea. However, the doctor nurse was very nice and even called me the next day to see how I was doing. They have this super modern checkout process where a live agent on the screen shows up from a remote location and you check out with her virtually right there and then with the POS credit card machine. Then it’s really cool because you go out to the lobby and there’s this massive vending machine for your medicine where you put in a code and they fall out.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Alina - Thank you for choosing Baptist Health and trusting our team with your care. We greatly appreciate your five-star review. We wish you all the best!

I came into Baptist Urgent Care on Saturday not feeling my best, and I’m so grateful for the care I received. I was seen almost immediately, and every single person I interacted with was kind, welcoming, and knowledgeable.

Dr. Da Silva was so warm, patient, and compassionate. He listened carefully, showed real concern, and made a stressful situation feel much more manageable.

I was able to pick up my prescription right in the office was also such a huge plus and made everything so easy.

Major shoutout to the entire team, you were all so helpful. Highly recommend!

reviews.review_text: Be careful about your insurance and cost transparency there. I checked with my insurance and also with Baptist before I went there, and both places said I was covered with a copay. Baptist first charged me too much for my copay and has yet to refund it. I went 2 months ago. Then 2 weeks ago I got a bill with an out of network copay for $65 from someplace called Criticare for the PA they had there and I saw for 2 minutes. I called Baptist and they said that the charge was for the PA I saw, and they contract it out. I was not told that when I went to the Urgent Care, nor did I have a choice of who I saw or even knew who I was going to see. I went under the umbrella of Baptist Urgent care, and this lack of transparency is appalling to me. I have never been to an urgent care where there was more than one copay if my insurance covered it. Don't go here unless you dig in to coverage. My insurance company didn't even know they did this. They thought I was covered with my copay and that should have been the only charge.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello - We are so sorry your expectations were not met. We welcome the opportunity to learn more about your experience. reviews.review_text: Fast but $349 for the visit is too expensive

Pricing is NOT transparent. If you are a self pay /non insured patient and do not pay IN FULL on the day of service your bill will triple in price. They will give you a “package price” on the day of service and if you do not pay that amount it is no longer honored. They will give you the option on day of service to Pay or Be Billed and NEVER explain there will be a massive increase in price if you choose to be billed.
You will then receive two Separate bills one for the doctor and one for facility fee totaling near $1,000.00 for an URGENT CARE VISIT!!!!!!! I had a covid swab and flu swab taken. They should feel ashamed of this level of deceitfulness. Absolutely be aware of this!!! Truly awful experience.

reviews.review_text:
Excellent front desk, excellent xray tech. He was very professional, kind and fast. Unfortunatelly the doctor in charge, Dr.Santos was not what I feel a caring doctor should be. Especially, working for Baptist. I was told I have acute bronchitis, a condition I had before. Medication was spent to CVS to be filled. CVS let me know that the cough syrup was not available and they were not sure when they could get it. I decided to call the Urgent Care and speak to the doctor. She never got on the phone. She reused to change the cough syrup even when I mentioned what had worked for me in the past. I just wanted something to stop the cough and be able to sleep. I was then told that the doctor said to get over the counter cough syrup. She didnt remember I am a diabetic and over the counter syrup are all sugar. When i reminded them of this i given wrong information about the cough syrup I had taken in the past. Today I check with my doctor and I was right and not what the doctor at Baptist was claiming. I was not going to argue. It was 8pm, I had a headache, a terrible cough and a fever. The doctor wanted me to drive back to Baptist to get a physical prescription and shop around town for the medication she had perscribed. I could not believe how insensitive and uncaring she was. I responded I was not driving back when all the doctor had to do is click a key and perscribe any other cough drop. She refused. I told them I would give the doctor a negative review. Needless to say today, which is the next day I had to see my primary and explained what happened. He took care of everything for me. I wasted my money going to Baptist Urgent Care. I will not return and I plan to tell everyone about my experience there. I already did!
Shame of Baptist for having doctors like her. This is my review.

reviews.review_text: Prompt and very pleasant while attending to my needs.
Excellent care an fast diagnostic

By the time I sat down in the waiting room, the nurse was already calling me in. Amazingly fast. They tested and diagnosed me immediately, filled my prescription and I was on my way home in no time. Wow!

Very mixed results. The senior nurse that cured my wound and did the stretching was excellent.  The rest of the crew, particularly the nurse that took my information and was responsible to make sure that the antibiotic order of the senior nurse was sent to the correct pharmacy was not only totally incompetent, but rude, condescending and treated me and my wife s if we were an imposition to her. She did not send the order to the pharmacy requested a 24 hour pharmacy, and did not advise us of it. I went twice last night and once this morning until I was told unequivocally  that they had not received the order.  I went back to to your office and was told that the order was sent to the pharmacy that I objected and not to the pharmacy I requested. A request that that in competent individual acknowledge to me that she would do. I requested to your office for the name of that you g girl so I could address my complaint directly about her and not sneer the rest of the office, but they refused to give me her name but promised me that they would do so later during the day. They never did. Therefore they do not leave an option other that to give the whole office an F.

A great place for any emergency care.  The nurse was great, and the Dr was the best.  Even the. Ray tech was great!

My visit to Baptist Urgent Care at Brickell was excellent! The receptionist was friendly and checked me in within minutes. I was quickly seen by the nurse and then the doctor, and the entire visit was very smooth. The only thing that felt a bit unusual was the required video during checkout, however, I did understand the efficiency behind it.  Overall, I was very impressed with the staff and had a great experience and care!
Super Great Experience. Everyone super nice and my child got the adequate attention.
Great experience. Staff were extremely knowledgeable, thorough, and friendly.
Excellent!

If you are looking a semblance of cost transparency from your urgent care provider, I'd urge you to look elsewhere because you won't find it here.  Went in for something very basic that I already know the market rate for: no procedures were done, just a 5 minute checkup and a prescription and I was on my way. While going in, I kindly asked them to be transparent about the cost of care, and they showed me a chart, attached. I asked them to please keep the level of care within the lowest tier pictured.  When I got surprised with a copay that almost doubled that amount, I called them multiple times to at least explain why the amount was so exorbitant for the basic level of care received.  The only piece of information they would give me, is a billing line item written as Urgent patient care lev 3 new UC. When I asked them to clarify what level 3 care meant, they proceeded to bounce me between 5 different agents on the phone, claiming another department has an answer to this question.  Finally, one agent stated was that it's based on some internal points system based on the condition you presented with and other factors, which the agent declined to clarify on any further.  Looking through the reviews, I am far from the only one who had this issue.  Thankfully, There are better urgent care facilities in Miami that are transparent and upfront about costs. Seek better alternatives and hold providers accountable for cost transparency.
Kind and courteous service. The entire visit was about an hour. They treated me with respect and were very nice to everyone else there. Lobby wait was less than 10 minutes.

I felt really cared for and that the service was very personalized. I came in with my neck completely locked up and in terrible pain. I had an X-ray, took some medication, and left feeling much better. The care was very human and compassionate. It may sound simple, but I was actually crying from the pain. Thank you for taking such good care of me.

Amazing service! I brought my daughter in after her seeing her pediatrician two days before, and diagnosing her with just a cough. Still running a fever two days later I brought her in to Baptist urgent care and they ran so many test and also chest x-ray to find out She had pneumonia. The nurse and physician were phenomenal ! So caring, broke everything down in Layman terms, it made us just feel safe and welcome.
Everyone was polite and considerate. They were able to take my blood tests, do an  X-ray and send my Rx to the pharmacy in one visit.
Very satisfied patient! Great patient service and awesome doctor! Thank you!
No wait at all.   Staff very nice.  I was in and out
Very good. Fast service.

I've been there twice and the experience has been truly excellent. We were served quickly and courteously, and the treatment they prescribed both times worked very well. Highly recommended! Thank you.
Excellent service. Fast and effective. MD: Wuily Diaz and RN: Zai Fernández were very good. Thank you for all the attention from the entire team. I highly recommend them.
Staff, technicians, and physicians were excellent.

I had a really good experience at Baptist Brickell Urgent Care. From the start, the pre-registration process was fast and easy, and I was taken in right away. The staff was amazing — CST Anjelyne and fabianne along with nurses Sarah, Roger, and Jennifer, were all professional, kind, and made me feel comfortable throughout my visit. The doctor was also very nice, attentive, and helpful. I came in with a lot of pain, and thanks to their care and patience, they were able to help me manage and tolerate it. I truly appreciate how smooth and caring the whole experience was.
Worst registered nurse ever. Didn’t clarify any of my questions. Thick accent, hard to understand. Yanet Reyes. Try to avoid!

Some of the nicest human beings work at this location. I had a bad cut on my finger a couple months ago and they were able to treat me with swift professionalism and kindness. Now I’m here for my wife and nothing has changed, In fact the gentleman who works at the front desk remembered who I was after all this time. It’s hard to find people who actually care and want to establish a connection with the community. Bravo Baptist, you are definitely on the right track!

reviews.review_text: Original review 2021: Best urgent care I've been to! Seems like every time I go to an urgent care, during the actual visit I've gotten only the urgent but not the care. Thank you Dr. Fish, and the incredible nurses & staff!  Update/edit in 2025: all of the above still stands - the team here made me feel so comfortable and cared for today. Makes a huge difference when you are feeling sick to have peace of mind that the place you're going to for help is going to provide such excellent care.

reviews.review_text: This place is an absolute scam. Fiance was sick and they wouldn’t tell us the copay amount until after she got back into the room. I’ve never heard of that. It’s standard that the receptionist area tells you the amount you are responsible for prior to seeing anyone. After she went back and asked about her payment responsibility (which was false and not the right amount she should owe), they tried to tell her she couldn’t leave and would be responsibility for the copay to see the doctor. She literally saw nobody and received no care at this point. All she had done was ask how much she would have to pay IF she received care. She went to CVS minute clinic the next day for $20 and got the medicine she needed. Absolute predatory operation at Baptist health.

Very good clinic VERY GOOD DOCTORS will tell everybody I know but your service

I had an overnight layover in Miami after a trip to Sicily. I returned with a nasty cellulitis from a bug bite that needed attention. My nephew who lives in Miami recommended the Baptist Health urgent care. I arrived at the office at 8:30 on a Sunday evening and felt welcomed from the minute I walked through the door. The staff were friendly and professional and treated me kindly, even though I imagine they were tired after a long day. I’m sincerely grateful for the care I received- I fear the infection would have worsened if I had waited until I returned home to see my own doctor. Thank you all! Yvonne Lucia
Excellence and professional quality
Friendly, encouraging, professional
Excellent care and very fast

I had a great experience at this Baptist Emergency Care facility! Since the moment I stepped in the staff was super friendly and professional, they listened carefully and were on top of matters. Thank you so much for your wonderful service and care!
Great staff, they really listened to me and there was no waiting around. Best and most professional urgent care that I have been to in Miami.

The attention was fast and courteous, and communication was easy. Yet, I was not given Aspirin upon entrance, which is customary when somebody experiences a dizzy spell like mine, nor was I given a CBC, nor were electrolytes measured.
I am blown away by the immaculate care I received from Miss.Sarah and NP Demis. They were up close and personal with me in helping me to get the best treatment experience. Thank you so so so much!!

I’ve had my share of visits at Baptist, but my last one was very disappointing. I felt shoulder pain and the doctor wanted to send me to an ortho and neuro surgeon. Besides that, when I was supposed to get the X ray, the radiologist wasn’t there so I couldn’t get it (this was Friday at 6pm).  By default, the doctor that saw me said then he would send me home with pain killers, and an orthopedic recommendation with the note to get an MRI. I left without the meds (I had no diagnosis to need painkillers), no finalized consult and with a bill.

Waited for hours. No solution. Even with insurance, horrendous bills after, which do not explain at all what they are charging. Stay far from this place or other urgent care facilities of this franchise.
They were great! Took really good care of me reassured me made me feel much better. Really thankful and grateful for the wonderful care I received.
Great service and amazing staff!

I am really pleased with my visit this morning.  Everyone is so pleasant and caring . Though I was going to be there much longer, I was in and out after having X-rays, dr.consult, and prescription in less than 90 minutes. Very organized and great attention. Thanks again.
Excellent service and professional staff.
Highly recommend!!
Quick, thorough and efficient visit.
Nice place good people but with no insurance very expensive!

0% recommended. I went to the emergency room and they sent me to buy a treatment that had nothing to do with the ailment I was experiencing. A cashier at CVS ended up helping me by prescribing something that eliminated my health problem.
I had an excellent Medical attention. The facilities are amazing and the all the staff (nurse and doctor specially) were amazing. I was very well treated and cared. Hope to get better soon.
Baptist Health Urgent Care is #1 on my list. Very efficient and caring staff. No long waiting. I always end up at their facility for minor issues. Give it a try you will not regret your visit.
Excellent service,
Excellent, great service, everything was fine

My experience at Baptist on the afternoon of the 29th of April was wonderful. Roger was very well mannered and very professional. The doctor listened intently to my problem. He was patient and he wanted to make sure that make questions were answered.
The staff is amazing. We are so lucky to have this facility.

Doing all the pre check in online before coming in made the process so much easier when i go there to check in. Dr and nurses were caring and understanding. Prescription machine in lobby makes it easy to get your meds and not have to go to a pharmacy. Check out process was easy as well

What a great find!  My husband and I returned from a long cruise and were feeling a bit sick. Before traveling on, we wanted to get tested for Covid, flu and strep throat.  We Ubered to Baptist Health Urgent Care and were immediately seen and tested.  The reception was amazing and efficient, the doctors were professional and empathetic.  We were in and out of there in one hour with prescribed meds in hand!!! A sinus infection and a cold.  Nothing we can’t control.   I was amazed, and relieved.  Excellent service, outstanding staff.  My kudos to ALL  at Baptist Health Urgent care in South Miami!  Well done!  Stay healthy out there! 💙🩷
My experience at urgent care was excellent, as usual. Baptist is my go to for urgent care visits and for diagnostic testing and has been for many years.
Went there with flu like symptoms and everyone there was very professional, kind and human. Waiting time was very reasonable. Excellent experience.
Everyone was very nice and professional. Was in and in less than 2 hours  including a bunch of xrays.

I was on a cruise out of Miami and became ill. I live in Ohio and knew I couldn’t fly back with the symptoms I was experiencing. The entire staff from the front desk, nurse, xray tech, registration and physician were simply amazing. They listened to my concerns throughly and went through all of the steps to rule every possible issue out, they gave me treatment right away that helped tremendously. Also the RX NOW program/machine was simply incredible! It didn’t take insurance but it was way cheaper than if I had to go to a pharmacy to fill them. I was able to get the prescribed medication immediately instead of trying to hunt down a place that was potentially closed due to it being a Sunday and Easter holiday. Being from out of town the RX NOW really saved a lot of headache and traveling around by uber. This was the best care I’ve received as an adult in a long time. This clinic should be the standard! Kudos and thank you for your care! Kudos Dr. Santos and Nurse E (sorry I don’t remember your spelling).
The best team ,excellent
I went in for a severe sore throat at 9:30 and was first to see nurse then doctor. It was very calming experience

Great facility and providers! I brought my son here after he became sick during the last day of our cruise. I picked this one as it is affiliated with a hospital and had good reviews. I'm glad we went a little further out from the cruise port to go here. The check in was easy and professional, the RN and doctor were top notch - knowledgeable, friendly, listened well. The doctor diagnosed my son appropriately after a nasal and throat swap and they have a vending machine pharmacy on site so I was able to fill his prescription (antibiotics and nausea medicine) within minutes (at $8 each). While I'm bummed we had to go to urgent care, I'm grateful for this facility.

In general, this hospital provides excellent care. I didn't have to wait long to be seen, and Nurse Tara, Dr. Reyes, and the radiologist are all excellent professionals and very attentive. However, I cannot overlook the lack of professionalism of Nurse David, who took my blood sample for the lab tests. He arrived with the sample collection equipment in his hand, and it was incomplete. One of the blood collection tubes fell on the floor, and he used it anyway. He applied the tourniquet without having alcohol to clean the area, which meant he left the tourniquet on for more than a minute. As we know, this can damage the collected sample. Furthermore, he ignored my suggestion indicating the best place to draw the blood, which unfortunately left me with a terrible bruise on my arm. In addition to this, due to some omission in the orders, I left the center without the medicine (I would say the most important) reason for my consultation, which was the antibiotic, so I had to leave home again for it.
Service was quick and efficient!!!  Staff was excellent!!!
amazing doctors and nurses! Everybody was friendly and knowledgeable. 👏
I received high quality service, and the care was very professional and friendly.  Hope not to be back, but if I have to I will definitely be back to this center.
great efficient friendly staff
Best service I have got in decades that supplied me with medicine right at the place Thank you!😊🤒🤕
Very clean, efficient and friendly staff.

I was seen quickly which always helps.!! I was in excruciating pain due to Lumbar DX.   I saw R.N. Eliazar and  ARNP i believe  her name was Jessica .Both were professional and kind . They were both accomodating and provided Excellent care.  Registration was high tech experience . All went smoothly.  Thank you..
Excellent service. Thank you.

I was seen right away, I only waited about 5 minutes, both the doctor and the nurse were very kind, the doctor was able to answer all my questions, he took his time and explained everything in great detail. Excellent care, top experience.
They are very professional and the medications are at a very good price.
The service is exceptional; everyone is very professional.
Excellent service!!
I feel lucky to have access to the Brickell location for Baptist urgent care. Everything about this experience is a 10 out of 10.
Service and attention was phenomenal! Minimal wait time and  gave a diagnosis right away! Deff made it my urgent care of choice whenever I’m not feeling well!
Excellent service

We live in the Coconut Grove area and this is our go to urgent care. I take my little kids there when there’s an issue not worth going to the emergency room but serious enough to be seen by a doctor. Although I like our pediatrician, I avoid going there if possible, and Nicklaus children hospital is way too far, and Mercy Hospital, unfortunately, is not a good hospital option for us. At this Baptist urgent care, we always get great service, they are very caring with the little ones, and I have always had a good experience (fingers crossed the good service continues).
Fast and excellent professional nursing and doctors services
Great staff, very professional 5 stars
Very efficient and professional.
Excellent service, staff and instant(+ cheaper) meds

This urgent care was amazing. They were attentive, caring and provided great care. Every medical professional, especially the nurses were wonderful and professional. I would definitely recommend them.
Quick, polite, professional.
Excellent and efficient service!

I had a very good experience at the Baptist Health Urgent Care. I was seen promptly and given the opportunity to ask questions. Everyone was courteous and professional. My meds were efficiently dispensed by a “vending machine” and I am feeling so much better in one day!

I have just spoken on the phone with Angela and she was very attentive! She made me feel more comfortable, less anxious about my emergency inquiring. All my questions were precisely answered and Angela showed the utmost respect! Her truthful empathy and compassion towards me, without a doubt, was reflected in our (recorded) phone call. I sincerely appreciate Angela’s willingness to listen & promptly aid me with my health inquiries. After this pleasant experience through the phone, I am more than comfortable and willing to visit the establishment for further medical assistance. ON MY WAY!!!
Excellent
I have a good experience. Both nurse and nurse practitioner did a good job. I felt well cared for at the reception and inside the room.
The care was very satisfactory and the medical staff was very professional and friendly, both the nurse and the doctor.

Great facility but so bureaucratic and inefficient. 1.5 hours to be seen and then another 45-1 hour for the proceeds from for your vitals; than wait for a provider (what ever that means), then a remote session over computer to check your billing details and a long wait for the nurse to close the loop.  1. How is Baptist making money if it takes roughly 2-3 hours to see one patient  2. Is it bureaucracy or lack of resources (hard to tell as there is plenty of people around the place from nurses to so called providers to medical practitioners
Excellent and attention and I was in and out in 40 minutes.
Service received was excellent!

I had an excellent experience at Baptist Urgent Care! The staff was quick, organized, and highly professional, ensuring a smooth check-in and minimal wait time. The facility was clean, and the medical team was knowledgeable, attentive, and thorough in addressing my concerns. It’s refreshing to receive such efficient care without compromising quality. I highly recommend Baptist Urgent Care for anyone in need of prompt and professional medical attention!
The front desk, nursing staff and Dr. where wonderful.
I was attended to immediately. The staff was professional, nice and made me relax and feel good.
Everybody kind profrssional and co take hood care for the patient
Professional care. I love the fact that I can get the medication there at a reasonable price.
I had a very good experience

Accurate and attentive care. I felt cared for from the moment I arrived at the reception desk. The diagnosis I received was confirmed that same afternoon by my cardiologist, who immediately prescribed the appropriate treatment. A very comforting experience. Thank you!
Felt confident in the evaluation that they provided. I feel I can trust baptist.
Dr Da Silva was excelente he took the time to review my case, explained me options and his attention was superb. I definitely would like to see him next time.

Place was super unorganized and not very clean. The nurse or doctor that saw me didn’t clean any of the tools before or after use  and stuck it in my nose and around my eyes. Then I was asked what I thought the problem was and was given medicine upon my diagnosis. I don’t even know if the person who saw me is a doctor. Now I’ve woken up with my eyes all swollen and infected. I came out with more problems then I went in with. Definitely don’t recommend this place!
I was in and out in no time Very professional thank you guys so much.

Dr. Santos and Nurse Eliazar are truly the best! They are extremely compassionate and helpful, making me feel relaxed even when I was panicked from the pain. Not very impressed. They did a chest XRay and there’s no diagnosis given on the  XRay. I thought that was the whole purpose of a diagnostic test. The doctor said, although radiologist doesn’t see it, I’m confident you have pneumonia. What is that? Total waste of time.

Everyone was extremely friendly and helpful from the front desk to the nurse to the doctor. The wait  was short. One of the best medical experiences I have ever encountered in my life  .Very effecient process .place runs like a well oiled machine.Excellent doctor,nurse and X-ray tech.The doctor was very knowledgeable and great communicator.

My experience at Baptist Urgent Care in Brickell was excellent. All staff were welcoming and worked hard to ensure that I was safe and well taken care of.  I am very pleased with the service I received.

The service was extraordinary 👏👏 Excellent Costumer Service !!! The nurse and Dr were very nice and  professional !! Thank you for having this facilities on Brickell and super clean !!!

Staff was friendly and I was seen in a timely manner. However, I went there with a very strong cold and severe sore throat that was very painful, and the pain was affecting my war as well. I asked the doctor for antibiotic and it was denied. Although I insisted that I only heal from such severe symptoms, suxh as sore throat, with antibiotics, it was still denied. Therefore, I had to go to a different doctor who prescribed exactly what I needed in order to get better. We tend to know what works for us as we grow older. I dont understand why it was denied at this location.

Quick wait time in the lobby and in the waiting room. I was in and out in 25 mins and got prescriptions sent to my CVS ready for immediate pickup. Will be making this my go to urgent care.

Prompt response to our arrival. My 9 yr old started c/o ear pain and headache. I live 3 minutes away and got there, 20 minutes before closing of center. They brought us into examination room and the entire team was  amazing with my daughter. My concerns as both a mom and a nurse were heard and understood.  My daughter felt comfortable and was glad to take home some stickers. The nurse at the reception, the nurse who took her VS and the PA were all 3, a 5 star team.
Excellent service from the team!

The service was amazing and so was the overall wait. The most impressive part was a rep by name of Gaby came to the waiting area to offer us: water, tea, juices and even blankets! It brightened up my day given such incredible service! Bravo!
Great service and very professional.

Exceptional service! Being from out of state I wasn’t sure where to go but I am so glad I chose this urgent care. The staff was friendly and fast and it was a clean office. The doctor was incredibly cautious and the x-ray technician was very patient and understanding with the pain I was in from my fall.
Easy check in very competent personnel..patched my wound and had me commit to follow up. Very satisfied

Excellent attention from medical staff. Maria APRN was thorough in her examination and review of what needed to be done. George at the front desk was very courteous and responsive to our questions. Definitely would recommend center to others.

I've been to the emergency room at your facility a few times, and this was a very unpleasant experience. I didn't receive the attention my emergency required, and they even forgot to give me a report of my visit to follow up on my accident. Neither the doctor nor the nurse seemed concerned about it.

They are great! Super efficient, genuinely kind staff with knowledgeable medical professionals who actually help. I have been to other urgent care facilities and this one genuinely surprised me with how good they are.
If you need some urgent care, this is the place to go. Each staff member was kind and caring. Baptist does it best!
Great and Fast attention.

I was dealing with both medical and personal issues during my visit, and the staff were all SO kind, helpful and reassuring - they went above and beyond, and I truly felt cared for. Also, there was a minimal (almost no) wait, efficient check in/check out and very clean/new facilities. Definitely recommend this location if you're needing urgent care!
Great service , very patience
Medical attention was ok, did have billing issues for which I had to visit them to resolve.

I needed to see a doctor asap and stopped by Baptist Urgent Care. I was seen quickly with care. The staff was awesome. I didn't have to go to the pharmacy to pick up my meds they have an automatic pharmacy there on site.

Everyone was so kind and I got the attention I needed. They also have great tech advances to protect the staff and make a more efficient, smoother process for patience. This stood out as a really wonderful medical experience
Didn't have to wait long at all. Easy check in. Both Nurse and Dr were very professional and caring. Addressed all issues very clearly. Would highly recommend when an Urgent care is needed.
It was quick and easy.
Excellent service. I was amazed by the friendliness of the staff, the cleanliness of the place, and the short wait time. Great experience.

Ridiculously expensive. I got there for a minor ear infection and provided all my insurance info. After waiting over an hour they had me waiting in the back for another 2 hours. Finally a doctor sees me to write a prescription. A month later I come to find out they never ran my insurance info and I got a bill for $500….. been on the phone all day with my insurance company trying to track down what exactly happened. I understand if a mistake was made but they NEED to be more transparent on their prices before they admit you. I mean $500 for a very minor ear infection? And on top of that, they apparently just forgot to input my insurance information? It almost feels predatory.
They were nice and caring. Glad they have an urgent care for Downtown residents
Such a great experience. The staff is lovely and the best of the best. Our nurse Joanne was so thoughtful and helpful.
Good mainly because of the X Rays capabilities and the location. Staff is a hit or miss

I visited Baptist’s Urgent Care on Brickell with persistent cold symptoms. I was out in an hour, with my meds (they have an on-site Rx machine), and received excellent service and care. I highly recommend it!
Very good service!! The doctors and nurses were very professional in their work; I definitely loved the way I was treated.
Thank you guys for being so nice to my mom.

I am so thankful for this location and their team! Flew into Miami for a cruise the next day. Day before trip I started feeling ill and had been throwing up for 2 days. We wanted to rule out anything serious to make a decision whether to cancel the cruise or not. NP Torres was amazing! She was very knowledgeable about the meds I was on and had a hunch they were causing my extreme nausea, but ran bloodwork and a stomach scan to make sure. I left with a GI diagnosis and the much needed assurance it didn’t appear to be anything preventing me from the cruise. They were quick, professional and treated me like family. Their small operation was much more efficient than I seen at most big facilities. Thank you all again.

Saw the doctor promptly; he was very competent, kind and efficient. He prescribed medications and, although I specified my usual Walgreens, the store did not received the prescriptions. Luckily, late in the day, I was able to acquire one of them over the counter; annoying.
It makes being hurt or sick a pleasure after being attended at Baptist. Nurse and Doctor so nice and humble. I never go anywhere else.
The wait is long than I expected.
Nice place, nice people working. Took a little longer than expected to be processed but overall I do recommend this place. The Doctor and nurses were very courteous and attentions to my questions.
Very professional and courteous staff.
From the front desk attendants, professional and caring, to the nurse and doctor who were competent, and thorough the experience was more than I could have hoped for for!
The staff was very accommodating, courteous and quick. Dr was thorough in explaining my situation and helped to calm me down.
My visit to Urgent Care was amazing! From the attendance at the check-in, the nurse's treatment, and the doctor's attention, everything went great.
Great care, Staff was very efficient, thorough and friendly.
Very professional service.  Went in on a Sunday morning and although had to wait a little bit was the best urgent care type of place I’ve ever been.  Thank you
Fast and friendly staff. Thank you for taking care of my daughter ❤️.

The service is usually very good. Today was no exception; the problem is that they wasted my time. I arrived and gave them the exact diagnosis of what my daughter had. I didn't see a doctor until a little over an hour after I arrived. Two nurses came by, but no one checked my daughter's ears. She has an ear infection, and I mentioned it from the very beginning, even when I filled out the form. No one checked her ears. They did a COVID test, and we waited, thinking the result would be ready in 25 minutes—an hour! I had to go outside to ask for the results because otherwise, I think I would still be there waiting. It wasn't crowded; there weren't too many patients, and there were plenty of staff, but I had to go out and ask for the result. They said it was negative, You can leave soon. For God's sake, without seeing a doctor! I asked if a doctor was going to come and see my daughter? And I emphasized that she has an ear infection and needs antibiotics. Eventually, and not long after, the doctor appeared, who was kind and diagnosed exactly the same thing I had. But it doesn't seem fair to have to wait so long, especially since I've been telling you my suspicion since I walked into the emergency room. Please consider that the rest of us also have lives and things to do. It was very simple to check my daughter's ears, give her something for the pain, and suggest the COVID test, which I had already done at home and knew was negative. I'm eight months pregnant, I'm exhausted, and my daughter woke up screaming at 4 a.m. with an earache—of course I know what she has!
The care and service was outstanding and very thorough!
The staff was very efficient, courteous and knowledgeable.

I would say the service is good [or at least standard], but the bill they charged for a simple visit was exorbantly out of line, and near corrupt. I went in and received an xray and prescribed oral steroids for acute bronchitis and was sent home. The provider was good and gave the correct treatment, but any other urgent care would have done the same for such a simple visit at a much more reasonable price of $150. This place charged me $500. I could have went to the emergency room with my insurance and paid less than going to this urgent care with my insurance.  It's ridiculous. I recommend no one go there for this reason. They were in my network for insurance. Pricing should never be that high from an urgent care. The billing department has also been unhelpful.  I have tried calling patient experience they were also not very helpful. At one point I was able to get ahold of someone there who said they would review my case and someone would call me back. I was instructed to not pay anything yet and i would hear back soon to discuss the matter further. Instead, they never called me back and I have been unable to get ahold of anyone else. Additionally, during my wait for their callback over the last month they have instead just sent the bill to collections for someone else to harass me about their rediculous charges.  Avoid this facility for their shady and exorbant billing practices. It's a shame the relatively good care provided here is overshadowed by the facilities greed.
Great staff and medical professionals.  Dr. Nguyen was helpful and had a wonderful bedside manner.  Highly recommend.

reviews.review_text: This was my second telemedicine call that was a bust!  I called the Dr office around 9 am that I had a sore throat and took a COVID antigen test that came back positive.  The calltaker said I would receive a call “in a few minutes” - the call came in at 11. This person set me up with  a telemedicine call for 2:20.  Then I received an email telling me to sign in 15 minutes before scheduled call which I did which only led to pages and pages of questions that took longer than my appointed call asking the same info over and over again that both my wife and have completed several times!  Then, the doctor who did call around 2:30 or so could not see my face on her screen.  We tried several different options to no avail - I could see and hear her, but she could only hear me.  The upshot was that she told me she had to terminate the call per State law because she could not see my face even though my camera was on.  So, I asked her if the office was still open and she replied yes to which I replied “I am headed your way.”  That did no over too well in that I could see it in her facial expression.  Then she says, “You know you could go to one of our Urgent Care facilities.”  So, I hopped in my car and headed for your facility on Brickell.  They were super good - in about 15 minutes I was with a doctor who advised me to just “ride it out” - no meds - fine with me, but that leads me to the technical issues with the telemedicine calls and why didn’t the nurse who I spoke with me at 11 tell me I could go to an Urgent Care Facility OR a telemedicine call?  Just seems a waste of time to me.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Frank - We are sorry you had this experience. We value your feedback and will share your comments with our team. I told them I'd had a fever of 102.9 for two days, taking Tylenol and acetaminophen, and that the pain was unbearable; I hadn't been able to sleep either night. What did they tell me to do? Keep taking Tylenol and acetaminophen for two more days? Seriously? If I'm going to a health center and telling the doctor I've had a very high fever for two days, how can they not give me an injection or something stronger? It doesn't make any sense. So what happened? Obviously, my fever didn't go down. It's obvious if I'm telling them I've been taking medication for two days and haven't improved even a little. How am I supposed to get better if they're telling me to do things that haven't worked at all so far? In the end, I'm going to a place where they have more common sense and judgment.

I went in for a right shoulder pain, the receptionist was polite and attentive, the check in process was quick and easy. However the nurse was not, she rushed through the questions and at times was pushy. The doctor was polite and very professional, he sat down with me and asked questions about my visit. After x-rays were taken he came back into the room and explained everything to me. But again the nurse felt short. Overall a good and quick place to get medical attention in a pinch.

reviews.review_text: My daughter was misdiagnosed. With the fever 103.5 they took Flu/covid test and did not took Strep test. Sent us home with “it’s probably URI or just a viral infection” and antibiotics “just in case”. The next day I had to take her to the hospital ER, because fever was not going away. At the ER they did the strep test right away and it was positive, she got the right antibiotics then.
I love this place! It’s always so welcoming and friendly. I live near the Gables Baptist but I always prefer to drive the extra miles because a better experience for me.

I Whent to this hospital to get a simple ear pain fixed. The nurse practitioner only saw me for 1 minute and said I have external otitis and proceeded to prescribe me the wrong medication to fix the problem since they got the diagnosis of the problem wrong to. Two days later I wake up with out control of half my face I now have bells-palsy because of this hospitals negligence. This a a severe condo that could be permanent and that could have been avoided had you guys not messed up. Not only this but I payed more here than any other place I have gone to with this illness. The doctors will try to convince you to buy ur prescriptions at the hospital in a self serve machine.. don’t do it it doesn’t take insurance and will be overpriced… say no they will push because this place all they care about is money. If I could give u guys a zero I would!

Staff was friendly.  The care was great.  Results were provided as promised.  However, the check out process was a disaster.  The nurse came in and said I would be checked out via zoom.  The rep showed up on the video screen, told me the total, but when I was for a break down of the costs she couldn’t give it to me.  She said I would have to “Call the billing department the following day”.  She finally got a supervisor that did a very poor, long winded explanation of the charges. reviews.review_text: The Lobby was clean the front desk clerk was nice and signed me in quickly and  I only waited less than 15 minutes to be called to the back The whole visit took less than an hour will recommend this clinic 👍
I wasn't able to hear out of my right ear. I thought it was wax but a long with the wax, there was a foreign object. Dr was able to remove it and I can hear again. Everyone was great 😃👍

Dr. Jessica and nurse Stephane were both amazing. I was so scared to visit as I am not from Florida, however they both had amazing bedside manner and were very patient with me. I am forever grateful for this experience with the two of them.
Very impressed! Thanks to the staff for thier help.

Great service.  I arrived an hr before closing and they assisted me immediately and I left with my medication on hand.  One day later and I feel so much better.  Thanks to the entire staff for being so caring.

Superior service at Baptist urgent care center. After I had only moved to Miami for a week I thought it would be difficult getting medical care, but the staff at Baptist checked me in promptly,, the intake paperwork was one page. I was seen promptly by a nurse who did a thorough intake of my problem, started my lab work and got the results right there on site. The doctor was extremely efficient and thorough and explained everything and prescribed my medication and recommended my follow up visits. The nurse escorted me to the lobby where my medication was dispensed from a vending machine at a nominal price. I also left with a full visit summary and medication guide. As a retired hospital and medical administrator, I can appreciate the quality of service that I received, and I think it was exceptional and the best urgent care visits I ever experienced.
Very quick service,  very kind and helpful staff.
I’ve been here a number of times and everyone is very nice and professional. They’ve even offered bottled water during my visits. Stephanie is a gem.
Excellent care. Professional, friendly and the wait was minimal.
Quick and efficient, I will return if the need arises.
Great service , was in and out within the hour, I’m an RN myself and everyone was great! Helpfull front desk staff and great nurse!
A great experience. Somebody took care of me quickly, and the staff were always attentive. I felt much better following the doctor's indications just a few hours after leaving the facilities. Thanks!

Hands down the best experience by far that I’ve received at an Urgent Care. Staff was professional and kind. Service was excellent and speedy. Facility and bathroom was super clean. They even have a cool machine that dispenses your meds (saving me a trip to the pharmacy). Loved this place!
Personnel is professional and caring. Always leave BHUC/Brickell feeling better than when arriving  and wishing I had gone earlier.

During a recent visit to Miami, I became ill and needed to see a Dr. I chose Baptist because of the great care they have provided my family over the years. I was seen quickly and the drs took my care seriously. While I was waiting to be seen, the nurse brought me a lemon tea because I was coughing. It’s attentiveness like that, that shows they truly care about patient comfort and that they care.
Excellent professional and humane service
Excellent service
this is the best urgent care for my cild thanks

This is by far the best experience I’ve ever had compared to other places. They took good care of me and immediately provided me a sign language interpreter using VRI. They were patient and helpful. Thank you guys!
Dr. Reyes Santos and his staff are amazing! His professionalism and that of his staff is exceptional.
Excellent

We waited 15 mins and were taken back to a bed immediately. Dr Castaneido was thorough, attentive, considerate and professional. I ended up needing to be transferred to the hospital but they did everything they could for me and made the transfer very easy.
I appreciate the valuable and prompt attention, they are collaborators and strive to offer a timely and excellent service.
Warm and friendly environment. And a great staff , very helpful. EXEMPLARY SERVICE.

Really great staff and very quick visit which is always a plus when you aren’t feeling well. They were quick to get what I needed (x-rays) and follow up with a recovery plan for me. I couldn’t recommend this location more if you aren’t feeling well.

When you are not feeling well and sick, this is the place to come and be able to see a doctor and staff right away. In today’s world reaching your primary and getting an appointment is nearly impossible. Here you’re are seen immediately and the care is outstanding. Everyone is extremely professional and service was above expectation.
Fast and attentive
Friendly, fast, yet detailed service.
Excellent service from start to finish.  Highly recommend this facility.

I had an outstanding experience at Baptist Hospital Urgent Care ( Brickell)The service was fast, the facility was immaculate, and both the doctor and nursing staff provided excellent care. I highly recommend it.
Service was fast, doctors and nurses were amazing and was able to get medication on site.
I was seen immediately for a skin concern. This was the quickest doctor’s visit ever. I’m so pleased with the service.
From start to finish, everyone I encountered was professional and kind.  I was seen promptly and all my concerns were addressed.
stuff is super nice and friendly,helped me with my issue and were very professional.
Excellent!!! .. prompt profesional service ..  great advantage  been able to get your prescription right there at the moment .. 5 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Excellent service and care! No long waits, very attentive and capable staff and everybody is very polite.
Incredibly professional. Well organized. Caring. Baptist Heslth has raised the bar for urgent care
Very professional staf Better than MD

This urgent care visit was seamless and easy. Dr. Rafel had an unexpected, but freshing bedside manner. As a patient I didn't feel rushed, but listened to and cared for. The staff was friendly and efficient.  Hopefully my medical issue will be resolved through the treatment prescribed.
Amazing service!
Everyone was very welcoming and attentive during my visit. Urgent care visits are never fun but it went as pleasant as it possibly can be.
Amazing caring staff , nurses and doctors . Excellent treatment and I was seen right away . I appreciate them all !

Third time I’ve brought my daughter here. Front desk receptionist Jorge was very welcoming and polite, greeted my daughter with a big smile, already setting the tone for a good visit. Dr. Alvarez Soto and NP Riza we’re very attentive and have amazing bedside manners. Nurse Kelly and Yakelin made my daughter feel so comfortable and made sure all our needs were addressed. Rene the lab tech and Eduardo  the Xray tech also came around to say hello and make sure we were ok.  My daughter felt very special! Service was fast, efficient, and kind. Thank you all again for a great experience!

It was truly satisfying, not only in terms of the staff's care, but also in terms of the promptness and professionalism of the entire staff, especially the nurse who treated me. If I'm not mistaken, her name is Lizette. Please thank her on my behalf. The doctor was also wonderful. Thank you so much.
Extremely friendly and helpful people. Great service!

** Please call your insurance (especially if you have Anthem / BCBS) BEFORE going here to see exactly what is covered. I got raked over the coals with Baptist's INSANE Urgent Care rates (if you are uninsured, they are akin to an ER visit!!)  1. VERY unprofessional staff, gossiping about the patients, other doctors, other urgent cares 2. I was seen by a NURSE, not a doctor - just be aware that you may not be seen by an MD or a PA, but a nurse 3. Long wait times, even with appointments 4. This might not bother everyone, but at the end of the visit they wheel in an iPad so you can Skype with their billing department. Just feels weird 5. INSANE billing procedures that I have NEVER experienced before. They charge over $600 just for the visit alone, let alone any other tests you have run there (flu, COVID, strep, etc.). Do yourself a favor and establish yourself with a doctor in the area so you can AVOID going here.

I visited the urgent care due to a persistent cough that I’ve had for three weeks. I was diagnosed with acute bronchitis and given various medications. There were a lot of patients that seemed to be coughing also which seems to be going around. The staff was very pleasant, courteous and accommodating. I happened to be at the Diagnostic Center next door to Urgent Care. I’m so glad that I went because now I can treat it with prescription medicine. Great experience. Highly recommend.
Excellent service
Very friendly and professional, minimal wait time to see a doctor.
Worst experience ever. They did not care to run proper tests. I ended up at the er where they were appalled at what was not done during my visits to this urgent care.
The service was excellent. I have no complaints whatsoever.
I had a great experience. Staff very helpful
Friendly, welcoming staff. No stress service.
Prompt and attentive service. Friendly and clean
Service was fast and excellent!!!
Everyone was very nice and helpful. I felt the providers listened to my concerns and I didn’t feel rushed. Totally recommend!

⭐️👎🏻Frustrating Experience Regarding Kidney Stone Treatment. If you have kidney stones, avoid this place; they won't do anything for you. They don't have medication to ease your pain other than offering you Tylenol and telling you to go to an ER because they don't have the necessary medication to alleviate the pain of a kidney stone. They will make you waste your time going through the whole protocol only to tell you in the end that they have nothing to offer. I had to suggest to them at least to do a CtScan to have an idea of where the stone was located to have a status and decide what to do, many more details that ultimately summarize that they are only there to bill medical insurance and leave with the same ailment with which you entered. What a waste of valuable time.👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼👎🏼
Very profesional and they prescribed the medication immediately I am feeling much better.

After going to UMiami Hospital ER,this ER was worth every penny. No patient mix-up, missing labs, blown out vains, no dirty overcrowded waiting room or staff with bad bedside manners. These folks actually cared about their patients.  If you’re too sick to wait for your medication there’s a automated pharmacy in the lobby. It’s subject to medication availability. I used it and it saved me from having to wait on my normal pharmacy by at least a day.
I was treated very nicely  and professionaly.  I cannot express my gratitude enough for the wonderful doctors and nurses at Health Urgent Care, including the reception staff.🙏❤️

Excellent care! Super efficient! Everything was very fast and smooth, since check in until the end of the visit. The doctor and nurses were very friendly and I they were very supportive of my condition. Thank you!!

The care was excellent and efficient; the doctors and staff were very kind and professional. A very good medical option for the Brickell area.

The receptionist, nurse, technicians, and doctors were were patient and clearly let me express my symptoms and they their opinions.  For good reasons, I hope I dont have to visit again. But if you are looking for a good UC, come to this one  Thanks!
The service was  excellent. Every associate  that  got in touch with me  was kind and helpful.

They had us in there for hours!! Wouldn't let me leave when all my daughter had was the flu. At one point the doctor forgot about us. And when he came back in the room he said what did I promise her again? Like you are a doctor and you can't remember 45 mins ago you were gonna send in flu meds. Not to mention the pharmacy was closed when we got there and I'm not from Florida so how am I even supposed to know where to go. Ended up just getting over the counter stuff like the original plan but they wouldn't even let us leave till we got discharge papers which took forever. I'm nice and patient till I'm not my poor baby was sitting there miserable for no reason.
The facility is nice and close to my home. Best part - it has parking. The staff and doctors were very nice and helpful. They greeted everyone with a smile.
One of the best !! 🫶🏼 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I visited urgent care for mild allergy symptoms in my eye (something that I had befo, and with my insurance, I pay only $50 for urgent care. Surprisingly, two weeks later, I received an unexpectedly large bill without prior notification or explanation, and I asked the front desk, they didn't tell me anything. Always ask about the price, and if they don't give it to you, go to other place. Now they will discuss this with my insurance im not paying this large bill.

Went to the Brickell Location this morning and was helped within 10 minutes. Friendly, thorough and effective treatment. We are visiting Miami and this was our 3rd time there in about 15 years; every time they have given us consistently good service.
Great service and everyone was very attentive.

From start to finish best urgent care experience I’ve ever had to date. Staff was extremely friendly, knowledgeable and professional, they were welcoming and made the check in process seamless and quick. Wait time was super short and minimal. Everyone I had the pleasure of interacting with went above and beyond, they took the time to listen to my concerns and explained the process and next steps thoroughly and clearly. I was provided with 5 star top of the line attention, treatment and care, the nurse and doctor were amazing and patient, ensuring that they did a thorough evaluation and covered all bases in terms of testing for possible diagnoses. I had a better experience here than at my own primary care physicians office in all honesty, I am beyond impressed. I was given a printed and comprehensive diagnoses, plan of treatment and prescription list. Checkout was virtual and quick, done simultaneously while awaiting my final test results. Will definitely be back and would highly recommend this urgent care practice to absolutely everyone, truly the best of the best in terms of medical care and treatment. 5 stars!
Staff is very courteous and attentive. Excellente service!
The staff was efficient and pleasant. Was very happy with how my visit went.
Everything was well organized and went smoothly. I was well taken care of, the staff was amazing.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Christine - Thank you for the five-star review of your urgent care visit. We truly appreciate your kind feedback about our staff. Many thanks for choosing Baptist Health for your healthcare needs.

reviews.review_text: I moved downtown and have been there twice. Misdiagnosed twice. Saturday told I have sepsis.. which is deadly.  Sent me to south miami ER who told me that's impossible since they don't have capacity to make diagnosis.  The ER nurse said they do this frequently.  If  u have something like a simple a cold etc they could be ok They freaked me and family out.  I don't have sepsis.  If u may have something serious then seek real medical care at another facility.  They are friendly but for me incompetent in diagnosing disease.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello David - Thank you for bringing this matter to our attention. We truly value your feedback and will be sure to look into your concerns. If you would like to speak to a member of our Patient Experience team, please email us at PatientExperience@baptisthealth.net or call 786-596-3750.

reviews.review_text: Dr Reyes was great. Took his time listening to my lungs and explaining. Great experience with Dr Reyes. My roommate was seen with same symptoms, originally did not want to listen to his lungs and immediately ordered X-ray $$ by the Pa and NP. Had to ask for the Dr NP to listen to his lungs and although she said it was clear still wanted the X-ray. Seem like they were wanting to order procedures for $$
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Albert - Thank you much for rating your Urgent Care visit. We are sorry your roommate did not have a positive experience. reviews.review_text: Two years ago my husband was admitted with COVID and the care was top-notch, from the person who greets people at the entrance to the doctors, nurses, and specialists. This time it was my turn, his wife, and I am very grateful to all of them. They are very professional and, above all, very humane. I recommend Baptist Hospital to anyone with a medical need. I thank God for people like you and I bless you.

reviews.review_text: I have been coming to this urgent care for 6 years now. And this was the first time I've waited for 2 1/2 hours to go back to get seen. The one woman I'm guessing she's a nurse that checks your BP and asked you questions. I didn't get her name. But, she made me feel very rushed and not very friendly. Everyone knows that talking or any movements can effect your heart rate. Needless to say she continued to ask all the questions as to why we're there while getting my blood pressure checked. Why ask the reasons why I'm there at initial check in if she's going to ask again? Didn't make sense. I ended up having the flu and she had zero empathy for anyone that's going to urgent care. Obviously it's for a good reason. Besides that the Nurse Practitioner Jessica was phenomenal. She listened, was compassionate, didn't make me feel rushed and was super empathetic. I wish she would stay at this location..

reviews.review_text: People were pleasant enough but the clinical flow and medicine practiced is substandard. I was seen in August with a severe sore throat/sudden loss of my voice and wanted to get into an urgent care because I had a same day flight home and would have delayed my travel at least 48 hours if I was highly infectious with covid (or flu). Anyway, I told them this when I went in and stated that I needed a molecular test for covid. The antigen tests have such low likelihood of detection that a negative test is useless, imho. And, you can get them for like $8 each. Waited an hour and was brought back by a tech (can't lookup current wait time online, which is unusual in big systems these days). Tech and someone who may have been an RN at highest training level (no intro) determined what tests to order after discussing amongst themselves. I again confirmed that the covid test they were ordering was a rapid molecular test (naat or pcr), and they confirmed it was. Okay, great. Waited awhile and they came in and told me the tests were negative and to wait for the doc. Doc came in, introduced himself, confirmed tests were negative and that I didn't have covid. He then examined me and offered some of the meds they dispense on site.  Pros: doc was pleasant. reasonably priced small quantity meds on site makes life easy. Cons: poor quality of care. tech/nurse determine what to order and physician just provides the results  So, I left and downloaded the app because I'm into UI/UX stuff and looked up my results. It was an ANTIGEN test. After all my confirmations. UGGH. I thought about it again and reminded myself that the tech barely swabbed me and that the test they were using was essentially 50/50 to pick up an infection. I looked up a place in Miami Beach and got myself covid pcr and of course it was positive so I pushed back travel 2 days until I was at least feeling decent, masked up and flew. Started prednisone as well because the first time I had covid I developed pretty bad pericarditis. When you go to a facility, you expect that the results they give you have some reliability, and if they can't fulfill your needs, they'll tell you. You shouldn't need to re-interpret the results for yourself. Don't bill me nearly $1k for being evaluated by folks who aren't trained to evaluate independently. Just tell me,  oh hey we actually don't offer effective testing or decision making and we aren't into evidence based medicine so maybe try elsewhere. Hard pass on these guys because realistically they set me up to be in a worse / misinformed state of health by going there at all. I hope the company re-evaluates which corners are safe and appropriate to cut. No hard feelings but really, put up a warning flag if y'all are going to keep this up.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Patrick - We are sorry to hear about your Urgent Care visit. Patient experience is important to us, so we will make every effort to address any concerns you may have. Please contact our Patient Experience team at 786-596-3750 or email PatientExperience@BaptistHealth.net. Thank you.

reviews.review_text: After work, I went to Baptist Health  for an ear ache, after informing the Doctor of my symptoms which included pressure and pain in my right ear. She examined me which included looking  inside my ear, and a jaw inspection. She concluded I had TMJ. I have never had that, no history of grinding teeth, no pain in my jaw, no neck pain. Prescribed 800 mg's of Ibuprofen every 8 hours.  The next day, not trusting the diagnosis I went to my doctor, missing 1/2 day work. When she examined me she said that she could not see my ear drum in both ears because of a built-up of wax. After a ear lavage, she conclude i had an ear infection and prescribed an antibiotic ear drops.  How can you rule out and ear infection when you can't even see the ear drum?

Upon calling to inquire about what this cryptic line item meant, they told me this is the charge for the doctor evaluation. To be clear I spoke to the doctor for 2 minutes and a nurse took my blood pressure prior to giving me the vaccination...This is INSURANCE FRAUD!
Excellent patient care!

Came because my son rolled his ankle after X-ray I was told he had a fracture and follow up with the specialist. (Why not taking the time to explain what type of fracture and how severe?) instead they give you papers to read and figure things out. Not Good!  Also, a fracture requires some kind of urgency, instead I was given a number to call; after speaking to them yesterday (Friday) around 5 they mentioned that someone will review the X-ray and call me for a follow up; it’s now 6pm the next day (Saturday) and no call back or follow up yet.  On a good note; people were nice, kind and the waiting was relatively short!  I’m about to call UM to get an orthopedic MD, not impressed with Baptist right now.

The staff could not be more accommodating, kind, ands knowledgeable. Minimal wait time as a walk-in. Dr. Jessica Sanabria is SUPER!!

Would give it zero stars if I could. My sister went in yesterday with a high fever of 104 and tested positive for COVID and the prescription was never sent to the pharmacy. I guess because she was there at around their closing time they just pushed her out and told her they would send the prescription to the 24hr Walgreens, so she went and waited only to be told they never received it. Here we are a whole day later and Walgreens still hasn't received it yet. This is the most unprofessional urgent care staff, but they didn't forget to charge her the co-payment. Make sure you get a paper copy of your prescription!!! I've tried calling with no luck.

reviews.review_text: My most recent visit to this facility was by far the worst ever. Although the reception area was empty when I arrived at 10:15am on a Friday, I sat in an auxiliary examination room (nothing but two chairs in there) for 45 minutes before being greeted by anyone (and only because I opened the door and made eye contact with someone in the hallway). For the 2nd visit in a row, I was told there was only one doctor available between 9am and 9pm that day (ridiculous in such a busy location; assume Baptist is cost-cutting). When Dr finally walked in at the 65 minute point, she was already harried and frazzled (location had only been open for 2.5 hours of her 12-hour shift!). I didn’t feel heard at all, she performed a perfunctory 90-second exam, and I left with no diagnosis, no meds, no go-forward plan…just an apologetic and embarrassed nurse asking me to sign discharge paperwork (which I refused to do since I didn’t actually feel like I received any medical services). It’s a day later, I feel worse…and I’m off to find a different Urgent Care that hopefully is better staffed and willing to help me.

reviews.review_text: I found this clinic very dishonest.  In November i came here requesting a CT scan because I was told by another urgent care that's what I need and recommended me to visit this Urgent Care.  This Urgent Care took me inside and took measurements, then the doctor came and said we don't have any CT scan equipment and suggested me to go to an ER.  So that's it. I've never got any sort of treatment and it completely wasted my time. They could have told me in the beginning or even over the phone when I asked.  Furthermore they sent me a medical bill asking $504.  It's completely a rip off for what I've got. Will never use here again and won't recommend at all!

reviews.review_text: This place does not charge like an Urgent Care. Expect to be charged ER level costs. I came in for a broken finger. The average cost of a finger x-ray in Florida is $150-200. Baptist Health charged my insurance $668 for a finger x-ray and $659 for a 5 minute doctor visit. Despite having in-network insurance I had to pay over $800 out of pocket when the average cost of an urgent care visit in the US is around $200.

Today I went after being sick for 15 days and feeling very ill. I don't usually use this system because I believe there are people who need it more. After waiting an hour and a half, a doctor saw me, and her consultation lasted no more than 5 minutes. She asked if I had been tested for COVID, and I said yes, that I had been tested several times and had always been negative. They tested me again, but didn't do any tests related to the illness I have. After another hour and a half, they gave me the results with a major discovery: I don't have COVID! They prescribed cough syrup and sent me home. It was unbelievable what a waste of time I had at this appointment today.

Normally overall this is a very good facility however whoever that new doctors is must be telling you why this   Facility is empty.

I went in Thanksgiving Day. The two receptionists were laughing at a nice old lady almost on her face. Once we were in, We could  barely understand the nurse instructions because the entire staff  was laughing and chatting very high volume, basically having a blast. That is an urgent care. If u want to celebrate Thanksgiving in advance so do not go to work on a Holiday and stat home for the sake of your patients. I had covid with a very strong sore throat. They gave me the usual medicine for covid without  telling me that I could go to a 24/7 pharmacy. I had to ask and after a while they found the address. They actually told me that they were about to close, which meant they had no more time to waste. As a result the day after I had to go to an other urgent care and finally they gave me a shot for the pain, and prescribe Ibuprofen 800, so the terrible sore throat got better and I could  swallow the pills they gave me the day before. BTW I never saw a doctor, just nurses I will actually file a formal complaint

I was really impressed at the high quality and standard care they have at this facility. The doctor was great ! Very knowledgeable and caring. The staff was excellent.

I went there with a horrible cough and everyone was amazing.  The wait time is minimum and the front desk staff was very cordial. My 5 starts are for Roger (nurse practitioner) and Dr. Da Silva, who were great with me and even made me laugh even though I was feeling awful. Roger noticed that my birthday was on the next day, and congratulated me,  that was very sweet of him. The medical attention is awesome, very professional service and excellent staff. They make you feel welcomed and provide the best care for you.  Lastly, the young lady that helped me with my check out was very patient and took the time to walk me through the virtual process.  Thanks!!!!! I'll always come back when me or my family need it!
Visited on November 14th 8:32 pm when they close at 9pm. Quick and efficient care, staff was lovely and kind. Thank you
Service was excellent Wait in the front was less than a 1/2 hour staff in the back was excellent.
Everything about the service was excellent. Couldn't ask for a nicer environment and prompt, professional care.
Very good service
Friendly, caring, thorough, and professional.
Really great experience. The staff was so kind and great. Was in and out very quickly
It was a good experience, very professional all personnel working there, I didn’t wait too long.

I used to like this care center but it is getting slower and slower. I was one hour and a half to get X Ray done for my foot. There were no patients at the waiting room and inside there were only 2 patients.  Crazy. Don’t recommend it anymore.
Fast wonderful personal care. Almost when I get sick to go back again. ;)

They checked me in then left me in the exam room for 75 minutes.   The doctor said, oh I thought I had seen you already.  This was for pinkeye.  I was there for two hours because of their incompetence.  Never again.
The service was very good, but I had to wait almost 3 hours to be seen. I think they need more doctors to see patients more quickly.
It was friendly, quick and efficient.  Great facilities and distance from home.
Excellent service and staff
Nobody likes to get sick but if you do, you and your family can’t go to a better caring. knowledgeable, courteous and professional medical staff. Totally recommend!
The clerical & medical staff were great.  However, the patient to physician very poor.  One doctor overworked.  You need help or augmentation on high demand days. Ridiculous wait time.

Friendly, clean, personable and timely visit. My only problem was when they wheel in a screen for someone to check you out via Zoom when you have beautiful, working humans all around you. When the person next to me was being checked out, everyone could hear the personal conversation about personal details and the credit card for copay. This doesn’t belong in a healthcare setting. Human to human interaction is best.

The attention was excellent and fast. Everyone was kind and knowledgeable. Specifically the nurse practitioner Denis Rey was amazing. He was very knowledgeable, explained everything very clearly and he was very patient and caring.
Best medical care I’ve received in Miami in my 7 years here! From front desk fella to the nurses to the doctor - lovely, kind, professional folks who know their stuff. Ty!! 💕
Everyone is super nice, and took care of me right away.
Long wait but very caring staff
I went Baptist Health yesterday and, today I feel a lot better! So thank God for them.

Courteous staff at the Urgent Care facility on Brickell.. Dr. da Silva was very informative and assuring.  My nurse Yakelin Queija took down all of my info and entered it all in the system.  She also was professional and assured me all would be fine.  The care was second to none.  Then the ease of use of the patient portal to obtain my results.  Again, second to none.  Thank you for making a stressful experience, EJOYABLE & STRESS FREE.

This place is very unprofessional. I called to set up an appointment a week prior to get a mammogram done, yes I’m a little younger than the age required to get a mammogram but why did they waited until I got there to tell me they couldn’t do it because I was too young and they didn’t have enough information as to why I needed the mammogram. Like they had a whole week to call me ask me but nooo they waited until I got there. I wasted my time for nothing. All the had to do is give me call prior to me getting there. Mind you I spoke to someone the day before and nothing was mentioned to me.. NEVER AGAIN

My little boy cut himself he was scared but once with your staff all the fears went away. From the nurse to the X-ray tech to the dr just everyone reassured him. It brings me peace of mind to know I have you guys close by.
A little bit of a wait but I understand that was due to an emergency. Otherwise, the staff was kind, caring, and full of knowledge. The lab work was quick and medicine is available on site.
