reviews.review_text: We live in a time of a mental health crisis yet urgent care doctors lack the basic education on such important matter! “being high” is not a medical diagnosis! A simple Google search would show that cannabis can induce psychotic episodes including schizophrenia, delirium, disassociation also panic attacks even with people who have no history of mental illness!! Especially if they are not used to taking cannabis on a regular basis and don’t have a reference of how the cannabis can affect or alter their perception of reality! It can be a scary experience! It can get confused of having a stroke or a heart attack! The doctor who saw me in this urgent care told me in my face “ they don’t teach us these things” Well! You have a computer in your pocket if you ever would want to learn and upgrade your poor education because God forbid, you care about saving lives not just being employee! He also had bedside manners of a butcher in slaughterhouse!! I was clearly panicking since i’m not a weed person and wasn’t expecting any psychoactive effect from the cbd oil i took which turned out that has some of the legal component delta 8 (honestly i’m not sure how this is legal in all stores without a prescription)! I was not supposed to be left alone and discharged with a complete disassociation but I think these people are not in the business of saving lives! The nurse was compassionate tho. The incident was 6/24 at 8:25 pm. The physician’s name on my discharge peppers is Da Silva, Bruno MD

My experience on Friday, June 17th was wonderful. I was assisted by 8 individuals who were courteous and professional: Male Receptionist - helpful, Female Walk-in Assistant - very pleasant, Tara - Amazing & loving, Samantha - professional & great, Bernice - wonderful & Doctor-like applying bandages & Tetanus Vaccine, X-Ray Technician - courteous & efficient, Danae - very sweet and Digital Rep - very nice. Medication was ordered and my condition and risks was explained by the nurses. Wonderful staff!!
Thank you so much for your attention to Chris, Nurse Kelly RN, and Dr. Alvarez.
Considering my circumstances, my experience was very pleasant. Definitely, making it my go to spot when in need of an urgent care.
I was seen super fast, the medical staff, Dr. Roger Alvarez and nurse Kellyrn, provided excellent care…

This was maybe the best medical visit I’ve ever had. I avoid doctors at all costs but was forced to go in and have something looked at and I’m so glad I chose this clinic. Stephanie in particular was AMAZING, and the Doc who saw me was professional and courteous. Once I got back to my room I was out of there within 45 minutes too. I HIGHLY recommend this clinic!
Slow, they take patients out of order or they don’t explain that someone with more urgent needs might go first. I don’t even know is that is why. Just be prepared to wait and wait.
The service was fast and reliable. The staff are outstanding to their professionalism care and patient well being. Give special thanks to Dr. Soto for his care.

Very good, fast service and everything. The only bad thing was that they prescribed a prescription for me and told me to come and claim it since they'd already ordered it. They made me go back two days in a row to claim it, and they told me at the pharmacy that they hadn't ordered anything.
Great experience. The staff is very professional and very kind!!! They make you feel better since the minute you arrive !
My experience was very good, the nurse was so attentive and kind just as well as the rest of the staff. Great service!

Excellent care from the medical team at Baptist Health Urgent Care in Brickell. After a 5-minute wait, they performed an X-ray, gave me a diagnosis, and prescribed medication within an hour. Very professional and friendly service. I will continue to use them…

This place is AMAZING!!! 10/10!! As soon as i arrived everyone was so nice! I was seen right away! They have real conversations with you and treat you so well! I will 100% be returning if i ever need to in the future!!
Excellent attention, very fast, the staff are very friendly, my son and I feel very comfortable with the nurse and Doctor.

Everything was beyond fine and courtesy.  However I did not like talking to a worker via a walking monitor  system.  Many of the rooms have a curtain separating patient's space.  Everyone could hear private patient information.
This is a great Urgent Care!!! The location es right in Brickell, it has parking. Plus the doctors and nurses are very very professionals and caring. This service is superb!!!
Excellent service, everyone was very professional and they attended to me quite quickly. Thank you, Baptist Heslth
Excellent care and professionalism, I am happy to have this wonderful hospital.

Worst service ever waited for 4 hours, they forgot to put the doctors note for my daughter’s school in the paperwork and when I called to get it no assistance just one person repeating over and over that I had to go back and that they could not even prepare it for me. No minimal assistance once the bill is paid!

The personal working there is excellent, from the moment you come in and get registered all the way when you are discharged. Nurse Tara was excellent, knowledgeable and with superb bedside  manners. On the down side, once inside, I waited one hour to be seen, this is close to Emergency Department times when taking about urgent care/fast track times.

A doctor never saw me, only a nurse.  The attention was very nice. (This review was 2 years ago  and yesterday i went again…. I will never visit this  place! The atencion was good but i spent almost 3 ours alone inside the waiting room!!waiting for the papers and a test result and the people outside smiling loud, the clinic was empty) again i will never visit this place.
Excellent medical care, very good and fast care

Good location and employees very helpful but when I went for a possible broken toe they made me walk to the X-ray room instead getting a wheelchair.  They said that someone took the wheelchair.  When I was discharged they came with a rolling iPad with someone connected and I had to give all my information name,  date of birth and my credit card with other patients next to me between curtains that could hear everything.  That is Hippa violation!   I am also a nurse that they should take you to another room to that transaction or do it outside with the receptionist!
Great service and the best nurses thank you !
Everything excellent!!!! Highly recommended in every way!!!! Everybody are very professional!!!!!!!
Well run clean pleasant stafff & an amazing dr . Not sure of his name . A very tall gentleman. Highly recommend!!!!

Great experience!

reviews.review_text: It was Christmas Day and the lines were long with a 2-6 hour wait for Covid tests and the staff especially the doctors and nurses were super friendly, compassionate and efficient.

We had first gone to another Urgent care but they had a waiting line about 2 hours. There would be no way I could stand for any where close to that. Unfortunately I am wring this from a Covid floor at Doctors Hospital with pneumonia. My wife and I started looking for a testing location that day. First to Tamiami and then Miami Lakes, then to Giralda, and finally the Urgent Care we are writing about. Solid 5 stars.
They were very efficient & helpful , wonderful staff 😀
Dr Estela Perez Garay was great, a human connection ,attentive and personal May God bless her!
My  condition was evaluated quixkly and dealt with. Adding recommendations to further my evaluation. I was satisfied with my experience there.
They do an amazing fast job.  All the nurses and doctors listen to my needs.  I love being able to get my medicine in the building.

I had out of state insurance, so told I'd have to pay $300 for visit.  And VERY VERY rude.  Wasnt feeling well but they didn't care! Poor customer care for an urgent care

This facility and the employees are truly the best and I’m s thankful.

Although feeling very poorly, the wonderful medical care I was provided, and the palpable and genuine caring from each and every member of the medical staff there, made me feel very grateful and actually lifted my spirits.  Excellent experience from start to finish.  Very professional and empathetic medical team!!🙏

reviews.review_text: The service was a disaster from the start. I went in with a really bad urinary tract infection; in fact, I went to the appointment because I needed something for the pain. I waited an hour to be called in, and once they finally let me into the examination room, they kept me waiting for another hour for a doctor to see me. Tired of waiting, I left the room to see what was going on. It was only then that a doctor appeared, who didn't tell me anything new. She asked me what I wanted to take, to which I replied that I had come there so they could tell me what to take. When she noticed my frustration, she offered me a note for work. Far from solving my problem, it made things worse, since I wasted my entire afternoon there for nothing. The only useful part of the appointment, the urine sample collection, wasn't done quickly or efficiently either. Because they told me they would call me in two or three days with the results and instructions on how to proceed with the treatment (this was on Sunday), and as of today, Thursday, they still haven't called. I haven't fully recovered yet, and I don't know how to treat it because they haven't called to give me the results or tell me what to do. The worst part is that they're charging me for this mess. I hope I don't get a bill for this terrible service; if I do, I'll see how I can refuse it.

reviews.review_text: I had a lower back injury and went in around 6PM, filled out quick paper work and only waited 30min before seeing someone. All the staff was very welcoming and accommodating, my mother went with me and staff easily spoke English or Spanish to explain procedures to us. I had x-rays done with another expert whom also asked about my injury and explained everything we would do to examine the injury. After that was done, a doctor spoke with me and asked further questions to make sure I did not fracture my spine or nerves and prescribed medication. I was able to pick up meds right there through a vender machine with a special code they provided me after the visit. Every step was very efficient and safe. They enforce 6ft apart in the waiting room and were very professional the whole time. I’m very pleased with my experience given the pain I was in. Thank you!
reviews.owner_answer: Hello - We truly appreciate your five-star review of your Urgent Care visit and kind words about our staff. We strive to provide outstanding care and service and your satisfaction is very important to us. Thank you for choosing Baptist Health!

reviews.review_text: Excellent service
Excellent service! Both the doctor and the assistant Kelli were very kind and professional. Thank you to the whole team for your help.
The staff was very attentive and great attention very good timing for  results. also dr on duty was very helpful and took  his time to explain .
Dr. DaSilva was the nicest doctor I've ever met. He was wonderful.

So I just got out of this place, still don’t know what I have. No medicine, not even a recipe only a “go home what you have might be viral” I am currently here in my house with 102 of fever feeling terrible. I think I have to got to another place later. My life is not a game and this people here treated me like that, if you are in pain don’t go here!

One thing I must commend this location on is their time management . Minutes after I filled out the initial paper work I was seen by a nurse . The nurses were great , especially the young man who administered my test. The doctor was now in the room and he moved very fast , before I could finish speaking he was out the door(exaggeration), moving fast didn’t prevent him from completing his job, it just made me feel that I wasn’t able to explain everything that was bothering me in detail. I explained my concerns with the discharge nurse about the medications I was prescribed and I don’t feel she quite cared enough to ask the doctor about alternative options. I left not being sure if anyone fully understood anything I was going through and if I should go straight to another urgent care. No one washed their hands before touching me , granted they wore gloves but were in a pandemic. I’m just not sure about this location , not sure if they following cdc guileless properly and if they are listening scrupulously to the patients . Overall friendly staff.
Amazing patient experience, detailed, active listeners and smiling. Knowledgeable and friendly while very professional.

I was seen within 5 minutes of walking in and was out within 90 minutes! The staff, Nurses, and Doctor were extremely profesional and knowledgeable. They cleaned up my wounds very well and were very attentive! They took all of the proper precautions and I left feeling confident about my recovery.
Excellent in all ways.

Quick and efficient. Friendly staff from the front desk girl, the girl who took my vitals, the nurse practitioner that checked me out and the physician she consulted. Went in for an abscess and back pain and was picking up the meds from my pharmacy within 30 minutes of leaving urgent care.
Very nice and attentive staff. Definitely would recommend. Thank you!!

The staff were very professional and friendly.  A couple of things I questioned in my mind, I was the only patient in the waiting room, two others came in about the time I finished the required paper work. Both of those patients were called in before me. I decided that their need was greater than mine. After about 40 minutes I was called in and ushered into room 3. I waited another 15 minutes until I was called back into the ex-ray room. The procedure was quick and painless. I was brought back to room 3. I was informed that a doctor would come in with the results in 15 to 20 minutes. About 45 minutes later the doctor came in. She was very friendly and thorough. She explained my treatment and then a gentleman came in to apply the wrap and brace. Again very pleasant and professional. While waiting in room 3, the lady in room 2 was one of the patients in the waiting room with me earlier. I heard the medical professional say to the lady in room 2 that she had bad news, she was covid positive,  and then she gave her some instructions. Here is my concern, I most definitely was exposed to covid 19 in the waiting room and so were the other other two people in the waiting room with us, however nothing was revealed to us concerning our exposure to the covid positive patient. Thank you for your service and for listening.
Fast, super nice and helpful.

Today Sunday 9/5/2021 me and my Husband both came back to Baptist Urgent Care/2660 Brickell for the Follow Up and the Important Peace of mind that we're both are for Negative Results, like to Comments that Doctor. Bonnie Jean O'Suvillan when She walk in to our Check-Up room she was Very Nice, Pleasant and Humble and with Knowledgeable answers to all our Questions.
The entire staff was great,from checkin to discharge. They were compassionate and kind and the service was quick.
Excellent service
Horrible.  This is exactly what is wrong with Healthcare.  Save yourself the trip and do not go here.  I will never visit Baptist UC again.

The front desk staff was amazing. The Dr. very professional and the nursing staff so pleasant and informative on how to’s and what to expect.  The automated pharmacy dispensary was so easy to use and inexpensive.   Highly Recommend this urgent care facility ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

They have been very attentive and professional with me, yesterday I was there for a COVID test and I tested positive, the result made me a little nervous because although I am vaccinated I am asthmatic and the truth is I received very good attention from all the staff from the moment you enter until you leave, thank you
Excelente. Very professional and pleasant. Thank you

EDIT-Just got off the phone with billing for urgent care. Criticare Clinics represents all the Dr's for Baptist Urgent Heath. If you look at their reviews they all say scam, fraud, scam, fraud and full of people being sent to collections after never receiving a bill. Why is Baptist Health Urgent Care associating with these people???  BE WARNED- When you come into the office for urgent care you will receive separate bills. So even though you pay your copay for urgent care you will then receive a separate bill from the physician for his time, from radiology for the test, and any other service. The physician I went to Artem Gutmanovich who performed the Covid test on me decided to bill me separately for his time but never sent me the bill and sent me to collections. Just be warned you will be sent multiple bills and one of the bills will be just for the physicians time, however, some of the providers at the location won't send a bill and will just send you to collections.  Went to Baptist Urgent Health Brickel and South Beach for a Covid Test in 2020. Paid my copay bill in full even though there shouldn't be any copay for Covid testing especially in 2020. Today received a letter from a collection agency about a bill for $220 from Criticare Clinics, INC which is an employment agency. When you go on Healthgrades for Criticare Clinincs all the providers for this place are the providers at Baptist Urgent Care. Also if you read the reviews from Criticare Clinics they are full of people who had never been to the place being charged for bills and sent to collections. 1) Was there a data breach at Baptist Health Urgent care? 2) Why is the employment agency that lists all the Drs that are employed  at Baptist Health sending medical bills?
Great people! Kind and helpful.

The place was full , however the personal  was very kind and sweet, just want thank them for a tremendous job they do every day. Nowadays is not easy find people with vocation. Im thankful for each of you that work at Baptist urgent care in Brickell.
Simply spectacular, everyone was very professional and very kind. Thank you for all your attention.

Really friendly service. Elizabeth saw me for a sinus infection and was really kind and efficient. I left with my medication and already feeling better.  I also had to take my two-year old son recently and they couldn’t have taken better care of him. Dr. Fish saw him that time and she was excellent as was the nurse that helped me. I wish I knew her name but they both made a very scary experience really seamless and easy. I’m eternally grateful.
If was not for the waiting time you would deserve five!

The service there is excellent. In the last three years, I've been twice, and so has my daughter. From the receptionist to everyone else, they are incredibly attentive, and their professionalism is top-notch! The cleanliness is meticulously maintained! Congratulations to the entire team!

Was getting a check-up and covid test. The male nurse who did the tests was very nice and friendly. The other staff had me sit in a waiting room after the test for an hour. When I asked, hi, what am I waiting for they proceed to tell me in a very rude tone we're very busy right now. They were talking about family Guy prior to me asking...

Terrible patient care. The receptionist was quite unpleasant and couldn't even tell us if our insurance covered it; she just kept repeating the cost, the bill, and the bill. She and her service were awful. I understand she's tired of her job, but it's not our fault.
Very professional.
Excellent service.
Excellent care; they reassured my daughter. The nurse and doctor were top-notch, very kind and attentive.
Excellent service, everyone was very kind from reception to the nurses and doctor. They were very concerned about my well-being. Excellent professionals.
Excellent service. Fast and very professional.
It was absolutely fabulous.  I’m traveling and thought i was exposed to covid.  Within an hour they set my mind to ease

Great staff from the entrance, nurse was very friendly and the doctor saw me and immediately told me what I had and told me he will prescribe me the medication I needed and then another nurse came gave me my papers , picked up the meds from a futuristic machine in the waiting area and I was on my way , everything was about a lil over an hour , great place. Will definitely return if needed !!!
Very good was my experience with them

I needed dressing changed on a incision and “doctor” was not comfortable doing it. So they refused to help. Really? Just to change dressing not perform surgery. I question the “doctor’s” certification.
My expirance was not good I would like to speake with somebody and explain my expirace.suposoly Jane or Janet will call me today, but nobody did.
I really liked this location. Super clean and staff is very nice and friendly . I was well taken care of.

If I could, I will give it zero stars! I took my daughter to the urgent  care because she felt and hit her shoulder on th ground, she could not move her arm and her shoulder hurt al lot, once there, the doctor ordered  x rays, when he results came the doctor and the pediatrician (from  the baptist urgent care) said it was nothing and to give her tylenol in case it hurts.. “I wouldn’t recommend you to take her to the ER” is nothing, worst case scenario she has tendon sore…. I took her to the ER and her clavicle was fractured! broken! 😱 worse doctors ever!

Loved the Doctor ,nurses, all staff to be honest. Very friendly and welcoming atmosphere if I ever feel ill again I will sure go back to this health care facility. ☺️ Thank you for taking care of me today.
Excellent
Doctors and staff are efficient but what made our experience excellent was the kindness and caring of doctors, nurses and admin staff! Truly magnificent how they cared for my 91 yr old mom.
Great to have them so near
No Help At All, pretty useless to have even gone.

I wish there was a way to not even give a one star, but I had no choice. This place is full of it they skip you they don’t care nothing about you, there’re  very rude they over talk you and feed you bs. I arrived at 11am when the door open up, there was a line of maybe 8-10 patients. As I was in line there was a guy that was pulling up to make the line and also a women, who both was seen before me when I asked about it, I was ignored and they over talked me. I would never recommend anyone to waste there time coming here.

Called before visiting and confirmed twice that the doctor could remove an ingrown toe nail. I further confirmed with the front desk that the procedure would  be done. I saw the doctor. He wouldn't even look at my foot/toe. He just said go see a podiatrist. He tried to just dismiss me like I wasn't worthy of his time. I also told him that I have severe panic attacks. He said we don't treat that either. By then I felt like I was having a heart attack and the doctor didn't care. Lastly I tokd him I suffer from this restless leg syndrome. Once again he said we don't handle that.  What good is an urgent care if they cannot handle basics. An urgent care is designed to be a conduit between a primary care doc and an ER. This was a horrible experience that I will not soon forget and certainly never recommend your organization to anyone.  I felt sorry for another patient that I witnessed visit your care with an obvious separated shoulder. Doctor once again said that they won't help.  So disappointing considering I was referred to you by another patient. Now neither of us will ever be back and we will spread the word that your organization is not in business to help anyone for anything.  To the readers of this review, yes, we were billed for our visit. Stay away. Keep your sanity, stay away
Excellent service from the front desk and doctors. The facilities are very clean and functional.

Very well done medically and with high levels of professionalism  Timely and all within with nurse, doctor and treatment in less than one hour, including prescriptions to CVS  I’ve been asked to return in two days for an evaluation of samples taken  Thank you  Robert Corell.
Excellent experience. Sympathetic with professional knowledge willing to discuss the problems. Easy to get prompt attention and treatment Thank you
Thanks so much ❤️ Very good services
Extremely kind and knowledgeable staff that truly care. 10/10 would come back again.
I was taken in immediately. Very professional and courteous.
the team is wonderful they made me feel at home.
In and out in an hour. All staff were very nice.
Good service
Outstanding customer service & “care”.  This is the only urgent care facility I trust & go to.
Always very kind, quick, and helpful in every way. Thank you so much for your attention.

Baptist Health Urgent Care is excellent.  I won’t go anywhere else. The medical staff is friendly and helpful. I have been there in the past and have always been treated in a professional manner.  Did not have to wait long.

Amazing facility with friendly and knowledgeable staff. I came in at around 9pm because I had an upper respiratory infection, and they saw me quickly. Nearly no wait! They have a machine that dispenses the medicine on site so you can leave with your prescription after the doctor sees you. If I ever need urgent care, I will be back again. ☺️
The nursing staff was amazing from start to finish. I didn't spend countless time waiting to be checked in and seen either. This is by far one of the best urgent care experiences I've ever had.

I could care less about any other hospital, how far I have to drive I'm going to Baptist Hospital for every aspect of my health.  My doctor's saved my feet, removed and saved me from cancer, and are helping me to see my granddaughter graduate.  Thank you Baptist Health.
This was a 5 star visit. Every person I came across was courteous and professional. I can really think of nothing to criticize.
Everyone here was caring and professional. This is the only Urgent Care facility I will use for my loved ones. Thank you!
Everybody was very professional, kind and patient

Got a severe allergy , nurses and doctor were very welcoming and let me know and feel that they will take good care of me, as they actually did. I were taken care as soon as i got there and be under observation for 30 minutes in a very comfortable environment. Thanks a lot . People that really cares  makes all the difference when we  feel vulnerable, in this case just from the welcoming eyes from nurse stephanie was a like a sea of calm in all this stress situation.
Excellent service
Excellent professional, kind and humane treatment
Excellent service
Nice, clean and respectful!
I received excellent and fast service. I left with a diagnosis and treatment plan, and the pills were in my hand. Melissa, the receptionist, was very attentive and helpful. Thank you so much!
I would to thanks all of the Staff for their prompt attention and the most important the treatment that they give to all of the patients God bless each of them.

Awesome experience. Made an appointment online for 5:00 pm. Checkin was super easy and staff was very attentive. I was in and out in 35 minutes that included an x-ray of my foot and diagnosis of a broken bone in my foot.  I definitely recommend the Brickell Urgent Care Center!
Quick attentive and their prescription medicine is available in the clinic via dispenser and code. Everyone nice and professional.
excellent attention, the very professional staff !! Inmediate attention. better impossible. we are very grateful to all the staff of doctors and nurses Thank you very much
Knowledgeable doctor Excellent care and results

I went in at 10:30 pm, they did an ultrasound and told me I had to go to a clinic. I asked the doctor at the counter to please call me a taxi, and he said he had called one but that I had to wait outside because they were closing. Everyone left, leaving me alone in the parking lot, and the taxi never came. I couldn't find anyone to pick me up until midnight, in the cold and rain. There was nobody there. It's shameful to know that there are people who do this.
Great experience, the staff, nurses and doctors are very polite and they help you address your concerns.
We went to baptist to get tested for corona virus symptoms. The staff there took care of us right away and was very knowledgeable. Nurse Silvia was awesome!
Very professional excellent service

I fell inside my boat and cut my forehead. Dr. Michelle Fish did a awesome  job fixing it with 7 stitches. It looks great and I will have just a small scar to remember to be more careful in the future. 🤣

Amy and Sylvia are the best RNs there! Kept me informed. Prompt on exams or test. Very thorough with my assessment. Most importantly they just listened to my concerns and took the time to get my history down. Very sweet and caring. Thank you!
Friendly staff and very clean, waIted for two hours. Overall a good experience

They were suppose to give me a prescription but rather funnel me to get the medicine at there machine. When i went to my regular pharmacy at publix they told me that paper was not a prescription. They were very nice to call baptist for them to fax the prescription, to our surprise they say they do not do that!! Need to get it at there place. Is that 100% legal???
Best urgent care staff was excellent

This is by far the best urgent care facility I have ever been to. From the reception team, the nursing staff, technicians, and doctors, all were true professionals - you could tell they truly enjoyed what they did and cared about the patient’s well being. I’m impressed how they give a thorough examination and do not rush you out, while at the same time respecting the patient’s time and not making them wait for hours. Please keep up the good work - although hopefully I won’t have to be back for a long time, I’m happy and relived to know your team is just down the road waiting to help. Thanks again!
Swift, kind and good service from everyone I encountered
Service was quick, and the ladies taking care of me were warm and helpful in explaining everything.

I’ve come here a few times. I’ve always felt well taken care of. This visit was quick and the nurses and doctor were wonderful. Loved being able to get my meds on site. I highly recommend this facility.

Physician rushed through the consultation and doesn't try to take time to explain the options nor hear out.. And the nurse seemed very eager to get me out of there...  Other than that, they had friendly admins and the x-ray result is definitely on the quick side.
Amazing service and experience.  Super friendly staff

I have gotten stitches here, dealt with sinus infections, had the flu, and most recently dealt with a muscle injury. Everyone is always kind and welcoming and makes the experience worthy. One of the best urgent care centers I have ever been to.
Baptist urgent care is the best.  Doctor and nurses so helpful and kind and caring.  Thank you for all your help today Michele Slowey Blankenship
They have the best customer service ever!!!!!
Very professional, was not crowded when I went (Saturday at 6:45 pm) and very clean.

Prompt, courteous and efficient health care, especially for minor concerns. Automated prescription dispensing machine is a timesaver  Visited to have Covid-19 test for travel. Very efficient & prompt. Results returned in less than 48 hours👍🏻

Nice experience specially being in pain.  Dr. Balding took care of me right away. He was super and gave me medicaments necessary for the pain.  It will take so time to recuperate but it is a great difference from yesterday!!! Elda Brouwer
Was treated immediately and very well but they took x rays and I had to call several times for results,
People who work there are lovely They received  patients with love This is a place to always comeback
3 hours start to finish to get tested for COVID. Was initially told a 30-40 minute wait. Came Friday before noon.
I went in at 10:30 PM on a Tuesday and the service was fantastic. Even after a long day, and few minutes before closing, the staff were all smiles. Good vibes
Stellar futuristic establishment. In and out for testing
The service was excellent and the waiting time was minimal.
The employees Did an excellent job I’ve been to this location two or three times very professional courteous And I would recommend this location to anyone keep up the good work
If I could give them 10 stars I would.  The staff was courteous and super kids friendly.  My 4 year old got taken care of efficiently and quick.  Thank you!

I live in Michigan and went to Baptist Urgent Care in Brickell. I was extremely impressed with the care, treatment and professionalism of the facility and staff. I would highly recommend Baptist Health to anyone.

I have used the services at this facility many times because it is the best. Everything and everybody there is great. I won't bother to repeat what everyone else has said in detail.  I do want to suggest that they change their procedure for waiting for certain test results unnecessarily (in my opinion). For example, waiting around for an hour for a technician/doctor to read and report on a chest xray is a major inconvenience. Even if there is a 1% chance that it comes back positive, there is nothing further that can be done that day. So why wait around? Either call with the results the next day, or better yet, just post the results on the patient portal.  I am sure that they are just following prescribed procedures, so I won't even deduct one star; but someone should review those procedures from the patient's perspective.  Again, overall a great place! Thank you for the fine care!

reviews.review_text: I've never needed the services of an urgent care facility to my delight. I beefed it on my Ninebot and was certain I'd fractured my clavicle (6 days earlier!!!). I'm a tough guy so this was just an ice and be patient recovery. My PCP insisted I get an xray. I dreaded the thought of a long wait behind a bunch of whiners with severe sniffles. From the moment I entered the facility my expectations were quickly allayed by the swift processing of a simple (non-invasive questionnaire) followed by about a 15 min. wait. Every step of the way was reassuring that I'd come to the right place: serene, sterile and obviously well run and organized. Xray machines have advanced tremendously since I've needed one (no more holding a lead bag over your privates). Their latest and greatest diagnosis equipment everywhere I looked was pristine and state of the art. This is my testimonial and there's no embellishments included. I honestly believe the Dr. had magic hands because not only did she disprove my self diagnosis (no fracture HURRAY!!!) but somehow transferred a magic touch while exploring my entire upper torso which occurred before the xray results. I even laughed and proclaimed to her that she has a magical touch because she walked me through a series of movements to determine the full range of motion. Prior to this (since my fall 6 days earlier), I hadn't been able nor even attempted to move my shoulder or raise my arm. I was in and out of there in 45 minutes. This facility is a blessing. It's also really close to my house and, while I don't plan to revisit anytime soon, I'm feeling pretty, pretty, pretty (had to indulge my  curb your enthusiasm influence) good now that I've got this facility on standby. Thank you to all those that attended to me. I apologize for not sharing your names.
reviews.owner_answer: Hello Craig - Thank you so much for rating your Urgent Care visit five stars and providing us with such wonderful feedback. Your satisfaction is very important to us, so we are happy to hear we met your expectations. Our sincerest thanks for trusting Baptist Health with your care. Stay well!

reviews.review_text: Best service i have experience out of any urgent. Care i. Ever had been to they follow all cdc guideline and made me felt safe while i was their and the doctor was really nice and very knowledgeable. In his work ..and nice and the nurse was another blessing. And was also nice as well
Fast and very nice attention from the staff.

The place is beautiful, the staff are very friendly, however DO NOT GO HERE THINKING YOU'RE GETTING URGENT CARE PRICING, you're basically billed as if this was a hospital ER visit. I  went here with good insurance for a fractured foot and ended up getting a $960 bill after insurance adjusted and paid. I  had the same exact injury 3 years ago, went to an MD Now, and it was $150 (and yes, called to confirm that had I  gone back this time it would of been the same price, so sad I  didn't wait for it to open the next day to avoid this mess).  Big mistake assuming an in-network urgent care would have similar pricing. What is the point of insurance Baptist??? It would of been the same price if I  went in and paid out of pocket without it.
Excellent care and attention

Awful experience. Very unprofessional doctor. She was mad at us for bringing our kids to test for covid even when they have had direct exposure, and she made sure we were not coming back again by hurting my wife on purpose! She inserted the stick so aggressively that my wife started to bleed and 2 days after it still my wife is still hurt. I have put a formal complain. She took advantage of her position as doctor to make her point. We have tested 4 different times in the last 6 months and it never was 1/10th as bad as this one.

Staff and Dr were great. But I misread COVID information. If you are looking for a quick PCR test I would recommend you look elsewhere. This is an Urgent Care facility and you have to wait to examined.
Great service and very timely. Everyone was super nice and professional.

The staff at Brickell Urgent Care was great. They were packed and took care of my flu shot regardless and quickly too. They were professional and friendly. Honestly, I don’t know how they do it. They deserve a bonus.
The Rn who called me back wasn’t friendly at all. Didn’t even greet us with a simple hi.
Very professional and caring staff!
Excellent all around.
I called to ask a question and the operator told me that everyone was busy. I waited 15 minutes and no one answered. I did it twice and it was the same.
No diagnose, -$500
Quick COVID test
Very good service, wait was about an hour and results were quick for Covid testing. I would recommend.

I had some initial confusion regarding what type of testing site this was/wasn't, but the staff cleared it up. The signage speaks to it not being a Community Test Site, and I didn't know the difference. Once I was seen, the nurse/doctor were great - they answered my questions regarding which COVID test I should get and discussed next steps post-results. Thank you
Very satisfied. I took my husband there for an emergency and they didn't make us wait for nothing. And there was no problem with parking like other places. I highly recommend it. Thank you so much.

I've been coming to this Urgent Care Facility for several years and my experiences have always been excellent. The waiting area is clean and they have a coffee machine. The staff is friendly and professional, the waiting time is always short. Nurses are great and doctors are the best, they really pay atention to what is going on. They can take RX. Overall it is a great facility.

I went to get a COVID test with no appointment since I had a headache and was not feeling well.  The reception was very well organized following all the requirements for social distance and mask.  The staff was very attentive and courteous.  The waiting was very short.  My test was negative 🙏 but they detected an acute sinusitis só a doctor came to see me, prescribed some medications which I purchased right there.  I was out in an hour with the results of my test, my problem diagnosed and taken care of and all covered by my insurance. Absolutely wonderful service!  Thank you!
Excellent staff. Very clean .

reviews.review_text: I love this place. After having some symptoms post Covid, I came here today to get checked out. From the front desk to the nurses, everyone here was SO nice and accommodating. Seriously, one of the best medical experiences I’ve had. The staff listened and were very compassionate, which Im sure is hard in this crazy time. The facility took amazing precautions snd even were wiping down seats in between patients, had glass dividers and only allow a certain number of people in the door at once. Silvia was an amazing nurse! I felt very well taken care of, I will only be coming back here for medical treatment!
Excellent service from the moment we arrived. Very professional. Thank you very much.

Very pleased with my visit today! I was in and out in about an hour. Staff was very nice and took their time with me. They took all the precautions to maintain social distancing among the patients as many were there for COVID testing
Great service!
The staff here was exceptional under difficult circumstances and long lines. Thank you to the front desk, the RNs, and the NP who were friendly, helpful and professional.

The security guard at the entrance is very rude will not even listen to you I came for a follow up appointment the doctor had told me I could come in at 11 AM just to take a look at an infection how it was progressing with antibiotics and this individual didn’t even give me the courtesy of listening nor did the girl in the reception

The MRI I had done was fine, the staff was great. However, my MRI was not received by my doctor. It has been over a month and I haven’t been able to get ANYONE to answer the phone at all. The only option I am being given is to physically pick up my records, but when you work full time that’s not an option.
Excellent service
Excellent urgent care!  The staff is super friendly. The place is very clean.  They attended us very fast even though they were very busy.  Loved the nurses and the doctor.  Highly recommended.

The patient treatment you receive at this Urgent Care is outstandingly good.It's very conforting when you are not feeling that well, to be surrounded by an attentive, efficient and super nice staff from the clerical to the clinical side.

SUSPECTED COVID . I went at 9pm on a Sunday. I was the only one waiting and was taken in right away.  Dr. on call and nurses were courteous and attentive. Great bedside manners.  I had been there before, was only asked at arrival if any info had changed. When discharged, I was given clear oral and written instructions and no paperwork to sign. I asked for any copays due, was told I'd be mailed a statement of services. Had shingles and flu vaccine at Publix  Pharmacy 24 hrs prior to visiting this Urgent Care. Overnight I developed extreme body aches, chills, fever, nape of neck pain, lethargic, shivers and sweating. Covid and flu tests were administered and results were ready in 30 mins. Both negative, bad reaction to both vaccines together which subsided 24 hrs later. scary.

My four year old and I went in for Covid testing. The environment was clean, I observed the security guard sanitizing seats and communicating with new arrivals  to direct them to freshly cleaned seats. He was extremely courteous and friendly with my son who gets nervous for doctors appointments. The nurse who did our swabs calmly explained it would be nasal and instructed me on how to position my son and keep him still and she did both nostrils quickly. She made it as painless as possible for us both. After my swabs were done we waited a while for the doctor. The wait time is why I give 4 stars and not 5.  The doctor was friendly and professional with a nice bedside manner and thorough in conversation. It was a very good experience. Especially if you are taking children for testing.

Came in without an appointment to have a Covid test done on my son.  We were seen within 10 minutes and had the results within 1/2 hour.  Staff was extremely friendly and helpful.  The medical team was very professional and informative during the entire process. Great job!!!
Helpful & courteous staff.  Highly recommend!

Before COVID and during COVID, my experience at this Baptist Urgent Care is always excellent. I've never had to wait more than an hour to be treated. From the front desk, to the care and treatment from the nurses and Doctors, they're professional, friendly, and provide exceptional care. Thank you!

I had a very pleasant experience today visiting this Urgent Care center. Was in and out without having to wait. The receptionist, nurse, and doctor were all very friendly and efficient. Everything appeared clean and well organized.

reviews.review_text: I went for a flu shot, and the experience was beyond great. They have an automated thermometer that scans your temperature as you check in. The online booking for the flu shot was a breeze, and plenty of appointment slots available to choose from.  The place has a waiting area that has plexi glass in between seats, and they are all very well apart. They hand you a brand new clean mask to wear for precaution. The waiting area was empty.  I am scared of needles beyond belief, but nurse Patty put me at ease immediately. She had a great positive energy, and assured me that she had a good hand (and she did, I did not feel a thing!!!). To my relief, the shot was painless, and I was done in a minute. Nurse Patty cakes put a cute green bandaid on the spot of the shot, and I was in and out of there in less than 5 minutes, laughing at myself for being so terrified to begin with.  Thank you nurse Patty and to all the BH personnel.

reviews.review_text: Excellent service and pleasant attitude of nurses and doctor.

The best experience always! The excellent service starting with the efficient receptionist, the nurses, the X Ray tech, the kind Doctor who gives you hope; agile, fast, efficiency, professionalism!! It is the less I can say for the best place to go with a health emergency!!!
Excellent care by Doctors, nurses and staff.
Amazing professional attention!!!!
Recently arrived from the UK, amazements service, professional, friendly and COVID safe. Thank you Dr Fish.

WE, my daughter and I, had another amazing experience HERE at Baptist Health Urgent Care! From check-in to check-out, the process was friendly, helpful, quick & in-person(not virtual:-)AND painless! Dr. O’Sullivan was-is-amazing, sweet, genuine and on-point, not to mention 100 percent knowledgeable as well! Our visit was completely worthwhile and without any doubt when in OUR next similar situation, there will be no hesitation as to Where We should go:-) Thank You
The staff was very nice.the doctor was very helpful,they saw me right away.

They are fast but so fast that they don’t even spend with you one minute, they don’t listen to the patient. They did not examine me at all, just prescribed medications according to what the computer tells them. Not the first time they do it to me.

I certainly appreciate the difficulty of the times. However since you asked me for feedback I will be honest. I came in around 10:30pm last night, without anyone else in the waiting room. I was received almost instantly which was certainly nice. I was rushed through the X-ray on my lungs and Covid testing process which was also great considering the late hour. The 2 stars come from this though. It would have been nice to spend more than 5 seconds with the doctor and I really am. It exaggerating, it realest was 5 seconds the first time and 3 when he popped his head in to say no pneumonia. I was extremely uncomfortable with my coughing and overall condition and just a few minutes of consultation would have gone a great way at the moment.  I was rushed out, which again was appreciated. The nurse up front asked me which pharmacy to send the prescription to and we agreed at a local 24 hour CVS. Considering that I haven’t slept the last three days due to coughing, I really looked forward to getting the prescription filled. When I got to the pharmacy I was told that a prescription wasn’t sent and I should wait. I finally gave up around 12am and went home feeling horribly and to another night of coughing and sleeplessness. I was genuinely hurt by the carelessness that went into this considering that no other patient was being treated or perhaps no rush of patients at the time. As of this morning the pharmacy still didn’t get my prescription and to make matters worse no one at Baptist picked up the phone for over 2 hours of us trying.  I still have no medication and I have been left utterly disheartened by the lack of care or follow through.

As an asthmatic I know when I need medical attention. I arrived and there was a touch less machine that took my temperature. The waiting room was immaculate. I did not wait more than - few minutes. I was brought in by Nurse Roger in asked me all the pertinent medical questions. Shortly after Dr Baldino came in did a full assessment. He ordered some tests and Roger was as gentle as possible. Before I could go back to my room, Pino took me to get an X-ray. Everyone was so pleasant and compassionate even though they were all in PPEs. I would highly recommend this Urgent Care because they treat you like family.

Very welcoming, temperature was taken upon arrival and information was taken with care. Cleanliness is a plus and staff was seen disinfecting patient area constantly.  Dr. and Nurse were very informative and addressed my concerns. Very pleased with their care.

What happen was the staff was perfect but the doctor was the problem he make me  fell like i have a desease and will spread it to his staff and he said that he is 73 years and he was affraid i will pass the covid to him but sorry i get tested and i was negative i test it again and waiting for result but that was really low profetional from him
Excellent service!
Dr. Baldino is the rudest physician I’ve ever encountered. Complained the whole 2 minutes he was with me, then shut the door on me and proceeded to complain loudly in the hallway.
Best urgent care in Miami! The staff is very sweet! In and out in less than 30 minutes!
Omg the best urgent care team ever.... thanks guys. God bless you
Great staff. Very satisfied.
The staff here is very professional 👏
Nice
Excellent service and excellent staffs

The staff and facility is clean, professional and very kind. During this pandemic it’s nice to experience places that still keep the humanity in their jobs. They make you feel safe and securing and I know they are making a difference right now in Miami!

I had a phenomenal experience , all of the staff is lovely and thorough. They provide the upmost care for their patients. My concerns were handled in a time efficient manner which I appreciated especially during these times. They also are taking the proper precautions to assure the safety of their patients and staff. Dr. O’Sullivan and the nurses were delightful , they made me feel beyond comfortable and if I could make her and that facility my primary care providers I would in a heart beat!

Went to MD now and was turned away because I had a low grade fever and some symptoms that could fall under covid -19. How could an urgent care turn a sick individual away? Found baptist health and they saw me within 15 minutes. Everything was extremely professional (sanitizing, social distancing, politeness). They swabbed me for strep and covid-19. They truly care about their patients,  I highly recommend this urgent care.

AVOID THIS PLACE - Horrible costumer service, if you have any COVID-19 related symptoms avoid this place and go somewhere else, I arrived with an obvious high fever, when they took my temperature they told me, I didn't have any, I asked for a re take and their answer was (for what?) I was having difficulties breathing and asked for an XRAY just to make sure that my lungs were fine, and again I received their famous answer (for what?). I felt horrible and helpless. I understand they are having a constant flow of patients during this pandemic but the Baptist is known for their excellent care and costumer service but this location is far from standards.
Was so fast the staff was polite and the X-ray technician was great they even call me the next day to see how I was doing
Had an amazing experience. Staff assisted me right away and got me in and out within an hour. Everyone was social distanced and made the patients feel comfortable. Will be coming here for now on.
Most pleasant experience I've had in a Clinic or hospital, friendly staff, very quick service.
Nurses , doctors , and other people at the urgent care were friendly. I felt welcome and secure during my visit.

Exceptional service! Never had such FAST urgent care service in my life (and I am kinda old). Caring,  compassionate and friendly staff. You bet I will highly recommend this to anyone needing urgent care!
The best health service, by far! Professionals and caring, Thank you!

Wonderful experience from the moment I walked in and was welcomed with beautiful smiling eyes (they wore their masks) by Jorge and Corinne at the front desk. Nurse Blanca also kindly greeted me and made me laugh by cracking a joke as she walked me back to my exam room. I instantly felt at ease by her and the vibe from the entire center. Nurse Patti then came in and took my vitals and medical information. She was funny and light hearted making me feel right at home. Shortly after, Dr. Rodriguez came in to assess me and discuss my plan of care. His bed side manner was super kind and compassionate. He was very patient and answered all my questions. Later, the manager, nurse Johanna, came in to see how I was doing and if there was anything else I needed. I was then taken to see nurse Lindsey for my treatment and she too was extremely kind, patient and compassionate with me. She talked softly explaining the procedure to make me feel at ease. I highly recommend Brickell baptist urgent care. They truly treat you special and make you feel right at home.

This place started off great when I was told to get tested for COVID-19.  I was told I could do Saliva Sample or Antibody Testing. When I got there for testing.  After waiting 2 hours to get tested with a friend. I was told that those options were never available and the only test I could take is the Nasal Swab by the nurse. Which I refused to take and I was told I would have to go some where else. My friend opt to take test and was given the Saliva Sample.  I don't understand what kind of Medical care facility these people are running but they cannot pick and choose what test they want you to take after I was clear what test I came to take after losing 2 hours of my life.  Please dont go.

reviews.review_text: Excellent facility! Excellent employees! The wait time was minimal. Much better choice than going to a hospital. Got my medication right away for $5.00.
Everyone was really nice, friendly and helpful. I would recommend this place  based on the excellent service (though I haven't seen the bill yet! :) ).

Went to the Er. Doctor was extremely fast. He seemed not pay a lot of attention to my case. I was prescribed with anti-biotics. I called today to ask for assistance because the anti biotic sent to me was not good on my stomach and I was told that I would get a call back, but I did not her anymore about them. Staff seems careless.
My treatment by a team of professionals, and the care and protection I received as a patient with leg pain, made me feel safe and protected. Thank you for everything!
The best!!

I was the only patient. I was waiting over 15 minutes because they wanted to wait for other patients then calls me in with everyone which makes no sense due to social distance. Then the required prescription missing they insist I go in and wait again and pay another Co pay just to get a needed prescription that goes along with what was already prescribed. They just want money! Place sucks
It was a wonderful one. Receptionist, nurse and the Dr were real nice and professional. The best !
The staff was very professional, caring and helpful.

Dr. Stanley is the best doctor. He always treats my daughter so well. He knows exactly what’s going on with her and always gives her the best treatment possible. Our nurse Stephanie Was also amazing. Very polite and friendly.

I went to the urgent care clinic yesterday because my left ear was blocked, I suppose from water.  The care was good, but the doctor, who only briefly examined my ear and told me there was no wax and that the water would dry with some drops he was going to prescribe, then decided to prescribe a very strong antibiotic that I had to take three times a day for ten days... clindamycin, which is prescribed for pneumonia and patients with AIDS, of course (his diagnosis was otitis in the middle ear). I didn't buy it... I stuck to the drops and it cleared up in less than 24 hours, therefore, INCORRECT DIAGNOSIS. It's like killing a mosquito with a missile... EXTREMELY OVER THE TOP!!! Besides being risky, I suffer from gastritis and that antibiotic is very hard on the stomach.
I booked in advance and after a brief wait they received me, Everyone was very careful to explain everything. The doctor, Albert, took care of leaving all doubts clear and check every possibility

I waited for 2 hours and the nurse who took care of me had no clue of what she was doing. She actually asked me what i wanted to take for medication and asking me what i wanted. Like that makes no sense, im coming to the urgent care because i meed you to tell me what i need. I told her that i had traveled and that i was feeling bad with a flu and she said they dont test for that and kept asking me what i wanted from that visit. She shouldn’t be a nurse at all. And whatever i said she will contradict me. Worst experience ever. Never coming back to that place. The Doctor was nice but not worth my time.
Quick and thorough service.

Everyone was very caring and  efficient. The nurses couldn't have been more helpful and did everything quickly and Responsibly.I couldn'tof been happier with my visit. I would happily recommend use of the baptists urgent care
Very friendly greeting. Long wait. Nurse very efficient and thorough. Quick Dr visit and a prescription. Hoping he was correct and that the Rx works.
Long wait but overall good service. Will try the remote consultation next time.
The staff and services were amazing. Thank you Baptist
We were here from out of.town when one.of.our kids got very sick from. Stomach bug.  Staff and drs very professional and diagnosed and had us with medication within 2 hours.   Highly recommend!
Everyone was super friendly and helpful.  All my needs were met.  Really like being able to pick up my meds right there and then.  The whole process just took a long time on a not too busy day.
Great service! Super helpful staff and now they have a machine that delivers the prescriptions... amazing

Today, I visited the Baptist Brickell Urgent Care. The staff was amazingly courteous, friendly, and helpful. The staff members that cared for me during my visit were Aury, Kylie, Dr. Jose Rodriguez, Omar, Eduardo, and Roger. I made sure to get their names to show appreciation for their excellent service. I would highly recommend that Urgent Care.
I had an appointment at 12 and was out by 1pm with medicine and all. overall great experience
This urgent is pretty quick and the staff is friendly. Wait time is not too bad.
Staff was polite and showed that they cared about you as a pt. Thank tou
Every single one that came to see me was very kind and professional ...it was my pleasure thank you. 👍🏻

reviews.review_text: This was the worst urgent care experience I have ever had… First off the room was full of employees just talking about their lunch the place wreaked of a cafeteria… People are there because they feel ill.. They are not there to listen to the employees selection of food or eating habits. This also makes me question the hygiene of the facility.. Don’t they have a lunch room where the employees can eat? On another note, Nurses and staff  would question each other’s work.. very sloppy.. finally , and I realize that doctors don’t know everything.. but I could have self-diagnosed better.. first the doctor didn’t even introduce himself, second he kept saying that they were not equipped to help me that and an ER would be better..  this doctor did not help me in the least… All he could do is suggest that I go to the ER… then he finally diagnosed me.. randomly, I assume based on my symptoms which i could have done for FREE! And I could have spared my wasted time from work...I definitely won’t be making any future stops at this urgent care center!

They even have a drug dispensing machine to get your prescriptions right there in the waiting room (depending on your prescription). Would definitely go back if sick on a weekend or after hours again!

reviews.review_text: Excellent and Quick service.

The most sincere caring Urgent Care I’ve visited! They didn’t seem bothered that I came in with a lip laceration, they just wanted me to know I would be ok and they cared! I was panic stricken but they had me laughing and smiling all the way! Great Staff from the receptionist the nurses to the Doctor OUTSTANDING PEOPLE AND FACILITY!  And the place was clean even the restrooms SPOTLESS AND INVITING! Thank you for a wonderful experience!
Under 10 min wait times and the staff was amazing!!  Got my leg taken care of and I was on my way!!
Everyone is very nice and helpful.

The best urgent care I have experienced. The medical staff was extremely qualified and comforting. True professionals. And I would fly all the way from LA again for that kind of care. Thank you so much for getting me back to myself.
From the time you enter until the time you leave. It's like you with family. Everybody was great. Baptist Health has change the different in hospitals. Keep up the good work
Thanks so much for the Gatorade.

The waiting room was full when I arrived. It was about noon on a Sunday.  The front desk was very nice and told me the wait was 45 min to an hour. I was pleasantly surprised when I brought in after only waiting 30 min. Nurse Roger was very gentle and put me at ease. He explained Dr Baldino would be seeing me and that he had over 40 years of experience. I felt safe. He came in and he listened to my complaint. He talked fast but he answered all my questions. Before leaving the room he asked if he had addressed all my concerns which blew my mind. I was in and out in a little over an hour which is better than my PCP. The best part was that I took the meds from the machine which meant I did not have to go to the pharmacy. Incredible urgent care!!

Very disappointed today. Online the stated waiting time was 1 minute. When I arrived I was advised the waiting time was 1 1/2 hours. When I brought this to the attention of the receptionist, she responded, “it has been 1 and one half all day. When I showed her the online notice, she simply stated “oh, well that information is incorrect. The online info is always incorrect.” I explained that did not help me and she needed to notify her IT Dept. This was at great inconvenience. I decided to come in relying on the 1 minute wait time. I needed to be back in the office as I had 16 people expecting my return. I had to cancel those waiting. No one seemed to care about solving the problem. If this is “always a  problem ” then they should not announce a waiting time online.

Great team and awesome service. All the staff is kind and very professional. They attended me quickly and really focused on me, specially Dr. Jorge Nonell.  If you have any urgent medical need, this is the place. Additionally, you can purchase yourself the medicaments needed in the same place thanks to an incredible pharmacy vending machine.
The staff was awesome!! From the receptionist to Stephanie, the nurse that helped me..and Dr Mateo .. Everyone was the BEST!! Found my favorite urgent care!❤️

The people were polite and professional but I felt somewhat that they were more worried about rushing me to the ER down the road and limiting their own liability than to really see if they could triage my symptoms.  The ER doctors took no more than 20 minutes to do an EKG and some easy physical checks on my left arm to determine I had a pinched nerve, and needed no special equipment  The doctor at baptist made a big deal of getting me to sign a waiver and saying I needed to go to Mercy ER precisely because they did not have the right equipment to test for cardiac related issues.  So I suspect baptist will now want to charge me a ton of money for the time I was there, yet it felt there whole goal was to do what was needed to get me back out the door and limit their own liability instead of effectively diagnose my problem
Courteous and professional staff; the physician who saw me was knowledgeable and prescribed the medications that were essential in my recovery.

I came in at 7.30 am with a bad cough. The staff was very nice and efficient and after having seen the doctor and done an x-ray I walked out with the feeling of having been taken good care of. Overall a good experience!
Friendly and professional staff from registration, to the nurse and doctor on call. It was a Sunday morning and it felt like business as always for everyone at the Urgent Care. Thank you!

thank you thank you Baptist is one of the best hospitals in Miami I can’t stress that enough but today was not a emergency was going through to my  my cousins  that works as a doctor  at Baptist hospital they only hire the best I want to take my hat off to you guys but today was a going to the bathroom but a young man approached me to see I guess what I was doing there felt kind of bad at first but I always go there but that was my experience today but thank you anyways
First try was not good but Came back a week later and was great

Baptist Health Urgent Care is excellent! We've used the Brickell facility twice and each time the staff and service was Outstanding.  I'd like to commend the staff including Karla, the Nurse, Silvia, Doctor Standley and Mercy a healtcare provider.  All of them we extremely cordial compassionate and most helpful.  We were there for a sinus infection which was causing my wife alot of discomfort.  We were in and out of the this facility in less than 30 minutes.  Even better was the medicine precribed was on had in the lobby in the automated machine.  I couldn't be happier knowing that we have a great facility list this near by.  Don't hesitate if you have a medical emergerny to go to this Urgent Care facilty. Thanks again to Batist Health and the great staff.
Excellent service and staff.
Everyone who attended me at the Urgent Care from the Receptionist, Nurse and Doctor were very nice, cooperative and very professionals. Chapeau to the Staff.
In and out in less than 1 hour!!!

Visited first Thursday morning for a possible broken toe incident on Christmas evening. I had taken my mother to this location over a year ago and found the service and staff to be quick, efficient and courteous. My experience was the same. I came in contact with Melissa, Omar, Eduardo and Dr Rodriguez and they were all excellent.
Very nice personal. Doctor fantastic, she helped me a lot with my issue. Very clear. I will definitely go back to them again.
very fast and thorough
Although the wait was long as many doctors are already on vacation, the staff was extremely friendly, patient and professional. Once seen, everything was really fast.

reviews.review_text: The staff was super nice and very fast to attend to my injuries. The nurses called me in within minutes of signing in. Both the nurse Silvia and Dr. Baldino were waiting for me in my room to examen me and ordered the xrays that were needed and pain medications. Xray tech Pino was kind and understood my injuries and worked around them to get the best images. The staff was superb from the front desk to the Dr nurses and xray tech. Definitely would bring my family here to be treated.
